ar: حمٓ
t: Hameem
u: Haa meem

ar: تَنزِيلُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلۡحَكِيمِ
t: Tanzeelu alkitabi mina Allahi alAAazeezi alhakeemi
u: Is kitaab ka nuzul Allah zabardast aur dana ki taraf se hai

ar: مَا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَأَجَلࣲ مُّسَمࣰّ ىۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ عَمَّآ أُنذِرُواْ مُعۡرِضُونَ
t: Ma khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma illa bialhaqqi waajalin musamman waallatheena kafaroo AAamma onthiroo muAAridoona
u: Humne zameen aur aasmaano ko aur un saari cheezon ko jo unke darmiyan hain bar-haqq aur ek muddat e khaas ke taayun ke saath paida kiya hai. Magar yeh kaafir log us haqeeqat se mooh moade hue hain jisse unko khabardar kiya gaya hai

ar: قُلۡ أَرَءَيۡتُم مَّا تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَرُونِي مَاذَا خَلَقُواْ مِنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ أَمۡ لَهُمۡ شِرۡكࣱ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِۖ ٱئۡتُونِي بِكِتَٰبࣲ مِّن قَبۡلِ هَٰذَآ أَوۡ أَثَٰرَةࣲ مِّنۡ عِلۡمٍ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
t: Qul araaytum ma tadAAoona min dooni Allahi aroonee matha khalaqoo mina alardi am lahum shirkun fee alssamawati eetoonee bikitabin min qabli hatha aw atharatin min AAilmin in kuntum sadiqeena
u: Aey Nabi, inse kaho, “kabhi tumne aankhein khol kar dekha bhi ke woh hastiyan hain kya jinhein tum khuda ko chodh kar pukarte ho? Zara mujhey dikhao to sahih ke zameen mein unhon ne kya paida kiya hai, ya aasmano ki takhleeq o tadbeer mein unka kya hissa hai. Issey pehle aayi hui kitaab ya ilm ka koi baqiyya (in aqaid ke sabot mein) tumhare paas ho to wahi le aao agar tum sacche ho”

ar: وَمَنۡ أَضَلُّ مِمَّن يَدۡعُواْ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَن لَّا يَسۡتَجِيبُ لَهُۥٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ وَهُمۡ عَن دُعَآئِهِمۡ غَٰفِلُونَ
t: Waman adallu mimman yadAAoo min dooni Allahi man la yastajeebu lahu ila yawmi alqiyamati wahum AAan duAAaihim ghafiloona
u: Aakhir us shaks se zyada behka hua insaan aur kaun hoga jo Allah ko chodh kar unko pukare jo qayamat tak usey jawab nahin de sakte, balke issey bhi bekhabar hain ke pukarne waley unko pukar rahey hain

ar: وَإِذَا حُشِرَ ٱلنَّاسُ كَانُواْ لَهُمۡ أَعۡدَآءࣰ وَكَانُواْ بِعِبَادَتِهِمۡ كَٰفِرِينَ
t: Waitha hushira alnnasu kanoo lahum aAAdaan wakanoo biAAibadatihim kafireena
u: Aur jab tamam Insan jamaa kiye jayenge us waqt woh apne pukarne walon ke dushman aur unki ibadat ke munkir honge

ar: وَإِذَا تُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ءَايَٰتُنَا بَيِّنَٰتࣲ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِلۡحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ هَٰذَا سِحۡرࣱ مُّبِينٌ
t: Waitha tutla AAalayhim ayatuna bayyinatin qala allatheena kafaroo lilhaqqi lamma jaahum hatha sihrun mubeenun
u: In logon ko jab hamari saaf saaf aayat sunayi jaati hain aur haqq inke saamne aa jata hai to yeh kafir log uske mutaaliq kehte hain ke yeh to khula jaadu hai

ar: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ ٱفۡتَرَىٰهُۖ قُلۡ إِنِ ٱفۡتَرَيۡتُهُۥ فَلَا تَمۡلِكُونَ لِي مِنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيۡـًٔاۖ هُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا تُفِيضُونَ فِيهِۚ كَفَىٰ بِهِۦ شَهِيدَۢا بَيۡنِي وَبَيۡنَكُمۡۖ وَهُوَ ٱلۡغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
t: Am yaqooloona iftarahu qul ini iftaraytuhu fala tamlikoona lee mina Allahi shayan huwa aAAlamu bima tufeedoona feehi kafa bihi shaheedan baynee wabaynakum wahuwa alghafooru alrraheemu
u: Kya unka kehna yeh hai ke Rasool ne isey khud ghadh (fabricated) liya hai? Inse kaho “ agar maine isey khud ghadh (fabricated) liya hai to tum mujhey khuda ki pakad se kuch bhi na bacha sakogey. Jo baatein tum banate ho Allah unko khoob jaanta hai, mere aur tumhare darmiyaan wahi gawahi dene ke liye kaafi hai, aur woh bada darguzar karne wala aur Raheem hai”

ar: قُلۡ مَا كُنتُ بِدۡعࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱلرُّسُلِ وَمَآ أَدۡرِي مَا يُفۡعَلُ بِي وَلَا بِكُمۡۖ إِنۡ أَتَّبِعُ إِلَّا مَا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَيَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ إِلَّا نَذِيرࣱ مُّبِينࣱ‏
t: Qul ma kuntu bidAAan mina alrrusuli wama adree ma yufAAalu bee wala bikum in attabiAAu illa ma yooha ilayya wama ana illa natheerun mubeenun
u: Inse kaho “main koi nirala Rasool to nahin hoon, main nahin jaanta ke kal tumhare saath kya hona hai aur mere saath kya. Main to sirf us wahee (revelation) ki pairwi karta hoon jo mere paas bheji jaati hai aur main ek saaf saaf khabardar kardene wale ke siwa kuch nahin hoon”

ar: قُلۡ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِن كَانَ مِنۡ عِندِ ٱللَّهِ وَكَفَرۡتُم بِهِۦ وَشَهِدَ شَاهِدࣱ مِّنۢ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ عَلَىٰ مِثۡلِهِۦ فَـَٔامَنَ وَٱسۡتَكۡبَرۡتُمۡۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهۡدِي ٱلۡقَوۡمَ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
t: Qul araaytum in kana min AAindi Allahi wakafartum bihi washahida shahidun min banee israeela AAala mithlihi faamana waistakbartum inna Allaha la yahdee alqawma alththalimeena
u: Aey Nabi, inse kaho “ kabhi tumne socha bhi ke agar yeh kalaam Allah hi ki taraf se hua aur tum ne iska inkar kardiya ( to tumhara kya anjaam hoga)?Aur is jaise ek kalaam par to bani Israel ka ek gawah shahadat bhi de chukka hai. Woh imaan le aaya aur tum apne ghamand (arrogant) mein padey rahey. Aise zaalimon ko Allah hidayat nahin diya karta”

ar: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَوۡ كَانَ خَيۡرࣰ ا مَّا سَبَقُونَآ إِلَيۡهِۚ وَإِذۡ لَمۡ يَهۡتَدُواْ بِهِۦ فَسَيَقُولُونَ هَٰذَآ إِفۡكࣱ قَدِيمࣱ‏
t: Waqala allatheena kafaroo lillatheena amanoo law kana khayran ma sabaqoona ilayhi waith lam yahtadoo bihi fasayaqooloona hatha ifkun qadeemun
u: Jin logon ne maan-ne se inkar kardiya hai woh imaan laney walon ke mutaaliq kehte hain “ke agar is kitaab ko maan lena koi accha kaam hota to yeh log is maamle mein humse sabaqat na leja sakte thay”. Chunke inhon ne usse hidayat na paayi is liye ab yeh zaroor kahenge ke yeh to purana jhoot hai

ar: وَمِن قَبۡلِهِۦ كِتَٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ إِمَامࣰ ا وَرَحۡمَةࣰۚ وَهَٰذَا كِتَٰبࣱ مُّصَدِّقࣱ لِّسَانًا عَرَبِيࣰّ ا لِّيُنذِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ وَبُشۡرَىٰ لِلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
t: Wamin qablihi kitabu moosa imaman warahmatan wahatha kitabun musaddiqun lisanan AAarabiyyan liyunthira allatheena thalamoo wabushra lilmuhsineena
u: Halaanke isse pehle Moosa ki kitaab rehnuma aur rehmat bankar aa chuki hai, aur yeh kitaab uski tasdeeq karne wali zubaan-e-arabi mein aayi hai taake zaalimon ko mutanabbe (warn) karde aur neik rawish ikhtiyar karne walon ko basharat de de

ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ قَالُواْ رَبُّنَا ٱللَّهُ ثُمَّ ٱسۡتَقَٰمُواْ فَلَا خَوۡفٌ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ يَحۡزَنُونَ
t: Inna allatheena qaloo rabbuna Allahu thumma istaqamoo fala khawfun AAalayhim wala hum yahzanoona
u: Yakeenan jin logon ne kehdiya ke Allah hi hamara Rubb hai, phir us par jamm gaye, unke liye na koi khauff hai aur na woh ghamgheen hongey

ar: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا جَزَآءَۢ بِمَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
t: Olaika ashabu aljannati khalideena feeha jazaan bima kanoo yaAAmaloona
u: Aise sab log Jannat mein jaane waley hain. Jahan woh hamesha rahenge apne un aamal ke badle jo woh duniya mein karte rahey hain

ar: وَوَصَّيۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ بِوَٰلِدَيۡهِ إِحۡسَٰنًاۖ حَمَلَتۡهُ أُمُّهُۥ كُرۡهࣰ ا وَوَضَعَتۡهُ كُرۡهࣰ اۖ وَحَمۡلُهُۥ وَفِصَٰلُهُۥ ثَلَٰثُونَ شَهۡرًاۚ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا بَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُۥ وَبَلَغَ أَرۡبَعِينَ سَنَةࣰ قَالَ رَبِّ أَوۡزِعۡنِيٓ أَنۡ أَشۡكُرَ نِعۡمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِيٓ أَنۡعَمۡتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَٰلِدَيَّ وَأَنۡ أَعۡمَلَ صَٰلِحࣰ ا تَرۡضَىٰهُ وَأَصۡلِحۡ لِي فِي ذُرِّيَّتِيٓۖ إِنِّي تُبۡتُ إِلَيۡكَ وَإِنِّي مِنَ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ
t: Wawassayna alinsana biwalidayhi ihsanan hamalathu ommuhu kurhan wawadaAAathu kurhan wahamluhu wafisaluhu thalathoona shahran hatta itha balagha ashuddahu wabalagha arbaAAeena sanatan qala rabbi awziAAnee an ashkura niAAmataka allatee anAAamta AAalayya waAAala walidayya waan aAAmala salihan tardahu waaslih lee fee thurriyyatee innee tubtu ilayka wainnee mina almuslimeena
u: Humne Insan ko hidayat ki ke woh apne walidain ke saath neik bartaao karey. Uski maa ne mushakkat utha kar usey pait mein rakkha aur mushakkat utha kar hi usko jana(delivered). Aur uske hamal aur doodh chudane mein tees (thirty) mahine lag gaye. Yahan tak ke jab woh apni puri taaqat ko pahuncha aur chaalis(forty) saal ka ho gaya to usne kaha “Aey mere Rubb mujhey taufiq de ke main teri un niyamaton ka shukar ada karoon jo tu ne mujhey aur mere walidain ko ata famayi, aur aisa neik amal karoon jis se tu raazi ho, aur meri aulad ko bhi neik bana kar mujhey sukh de, mein tere huzoor tawbah karta hoon aur taabe farmaan (muslim)bandon mein se hoon”

ar: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ نَتَقَبَّلُ عَنۡهُمۡ أَحۡسَنَ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَنَتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمۡ فِيٓ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡجَنَّةِۖ وَعۡدَ ٱلصِّدۡقِ ٱلَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
t: Olaika allatheena nataqabbalu AAanhum ahsana ma AAamiloo wanatajawazu AAan sayyiatihim fee ashabi aljannati waAAda alssidqi allathee kanoo yooAAadoona
u: Is tarah ke logon se hum unke behtreen aamal ko qabool karte hain aur unki buraiyon se darguzar kar jaate hain. Yeh jannati logon mein shamil hongey us sacche waade ke mutaabiq jo insey kya jaata raha hai

ar: وَٱلَّذِي قَالَ لِوَٰلِدَيۡهِ أُفࣲّ لَّكُمَآ أَتَعِدَانِنِيٓ أَنۡ أُخۡرَجَ وَقَدۡ خَلَتِ ٱلۡقُرُونُ مِن قَبۡلِي وَهُمَا يَسۡتَغِيثَانِ ٱللَّهَ وَيۡلَكَ ءَامِنۡ إِنَّ وَعۡدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقࣱّ فَيَقُولُ مَا هَٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
t: Waallathee qala liwalidayhi offin lakuma ataAAidaninee an okhraja waqad khalati alquroonu min qablee wahuma yastagheethani Allaha waylaka amin inna waAAda Allahi haqqun fayaqoolu ma hatha illa asateeru alawwaleena
u: Aur jis shaks ne apne waldain se kaha “ Uff, tang kar diya tumne” kya tum mujhe yeh khauff dilate ho ke main marne ke baad phir qabar se nikala jaunga halanke mujh se pehle bahut si nasalein(generations) guzar chuki hain ( unmein se to koi uth kar na aaya)”Maa aur baap Allah ki duhayi dekar kehte hain “ arey badnaseeb ,maan ja , Allah ka waada saccha hai”. Magar woh kehta hai “ yeh sab agle waqton ki farsuda(fables) kahaniyan hai”

ar: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ حَقَّ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ فِيٓ أُمَمࣲ قَدۡ خَلَتۡ مِن قَبۡلِهِم مِّنَ ٱلۡجِنِّ وَٱلۡإِنسِۖ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ خَٰسِرِينَ
t: Olaika allatheena haqqa AAalayhimu alqawlu fee umamin qad khalat min qablihim mina aljinni waalinsi innahum kanoo khasireena
u: Yeh woh log hain jinpar azaab ka faisla chaspan ho chuka hai. Insey pehle Jinno aur Insano ke jo toley(communities) (isi qumash ke) ho guzre hain unhi mein yeh bhi ja shamil hongey. Beshak yeh ghatey(loss) mein reh janey wale log hain

ar: وَلِكُلࣲّ دَرَجَٰتࣱ مِّمَّا عَمِلُواْۖ وَلِيُوَفِّيَهُمۡ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ وَهُمۡ لَا يُظۡلَمُونَ
t: Walikullin darajatun mimma AAamiloo waliyuwaffiyahum aAAmalahum wahum la yuthlamoona
u: Dono girohon mein se har ek ke darje unke aamal ke lihaz se hain taa-ke Allah unke kiye ka pura pura badla unko de. Unpar zulm hargiz na kiya jaaye

ar: وَيَوۡمَ يُعۡرَضُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ أَذۡهَبۡتُمۡ طَيِّبَٰتِكُمۡ فِي حَيَاتِكُمُ ٱلدُّنۡيَا وَٱسۡتَمۡتَعۡتُم بِهَا فَٱلۡيَوۡمَ تُجۡزَوۡنَ عَذَابَ ٱلۡهُونِ بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَسۡتَكۡبِرُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ بِغَيۡرِ ٱلۡحَقِّ وَبِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَفۡسُقُونَ
t: Wayawma yuAAradu allatheena kafaroo AAala alnnari athhabtum tayyibatikum fee hayatikumu alddunya waistamtaAAtum biha faalyawma tujzawna AAathaba alhooni bima kuntum tastakbiroona fee alardi bighayri alhaqqi wabima kuntum tafsuqoona
u: Phir jab yeh kaafir aag ke saame laa khade kiye jayenge to unse kaha jayega: “ tum apne hissay ki niyamatein apni duniya ki zindagi mein khatam kar chuke aur unka lutf tumne utha liya, ab jo takabbur tum zameen mein kisi haqq ke bagair karte rahe aur jo nafarmaniyan tumne ki unke padash mein aaj tumko zillat ka azaab diya jayega”

ar: ۞وَٱذۡكُرۡ أَخَا عَادٍ إِذۡ أَنذَرَ قَوۡمَهُۥ بِٱلۡأَحۡقَافِ وَقَدۡ خَلَتِ ٱلنُّذُرُ مِنۢ بَيۡنِ يَدَيۡهِ وَمِنۡ خَلۡفِهِۦٓ أَلَّا تَعۡبُدُوٓاْ إِلَّا ٱللَّهَ إِنِّيٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمࣲ‏
t: Waothkur akha AAadin ith anthara qawmahu bialahqafi waqad khalati alnnuthuru min bayni yadayhi wamin khalfihi alla taAAbudoo illa Allaha innee akhafu AAalaykum AAathaba yawmin AAatheemin
u: Zara inhein Aad ke bhai (Hud) ka qissa sunao jabke usne ahqaf mein apni qaum ko khabardar kiya tha aur aise khabardar karne waley ussey pehle bhi guzar chuke thay aur uske baad bhi aate rahey ke “ Allah ke siwa kisi ki bandagi na karo , mujhe tumhare haqq mein ek baday haulnaak din ke azaab ka andesha hai”

ar: قَالُوٓاْ أَجِئۡتَنَا لِتَأۡفِكَنَا عَنۡ ءَالِهَتِنَا فَأۡتِنَا بِمَا تَعِدُنَآ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
t: Qaloo ajitana litafikana AAan alihatina fatina bima taAAiduna in kunta mina alssadiqeena
u: Unhon ne kaha “ kya tu isliye aaya hai ke humein behka kar hamare maboodon se bargashta kar de? Accha to le aa apna woh azaab jissey tu humein darata hai agar waqai tu saccha hai”

ar: قَالَ إِنَّمَا ٱلۡعِلۡمُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَأُبَلِّغُكُم مَّآ أُرۡسِلۡتُ بِهِۦ وَلَٰكِنِّيٓ أَرَىٰكُمۡ قَوۡمࣰ ا تَجۡهَلُونَ
t: Qala innama alAAilmu AAinda Allahi waoballighukum ma orsiltu bihi walakinnee arakum qawman tajhaloona
u: Usne kaha ke “iska ilm to Allah ko hai, main sirf woh paighaam tumhein pahuncha raha hoon jisey dekar mujhey bheja gaya hai. Magar main dekh raha hoon ke tumlog jahalat barat rahey ho”

ar: فَلَمَّا رَأَوۡهُ عَارِضࣰ ا مُّسۡتَقۡبِلَ أَوۡدِيَتِهِمۡ قَالُواْ هَٰذَا عَارِضࣱ مُّمۡطِرُنَاۚ بَلۡ هُوَ مَا ٱسۡتَعۡجَلۡتُم بِهِۦۖ رِيحࣱ فِيهَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمࣱ‏
t: Falamma raawhu AAaridan mustaqbila awdiyatihim qaloo hatha AAaridun mumtiruna bal huwa ma istaAAjaltum bihi reehun feeha AAathabun aleemun
u: Phir jab unhon ne us azaab ko apni waadiyon (valleys) ki taraf aate dekha to kehne lagey “yeh badal hai jo humko sairaab kardega”. balke yeh wahi cheez hai jiske liye tum jaldi macha rahe thay, yeh hawa ka toofaan hai jismein dardnaak azaab chala aa raha hai

ar: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ شَيۡءِۭ بِأَمۡرِ رَبِّهَا فَأَصۡبَحُواْ لَا يُرَىٰٓ إِلَّا مَسَٰكِنُهُمۡۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡقَوۡمَ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
t: Tudammiru kulla shayin biamri rabbiha faasbahoo la yura illa masakinuhum kathalika najzee alqawma almujrimeena
u: Apne Rubb ke hukum se har cheez ko tabaah kar dalega”. Aakhir e kaar unka haal yeh hua ke unke rehne ke jaghon ke siwa wahan kuch nazar na aata tha. Is tarah hum mujrimon ko badla diya karte hain

ar: وَلَقَدۡ مَكَّنَّٰهُمۡ فِيمَآ إِن مَّكَّنَّٰكُمۡ فِيهِ وَجَعَلۡنَا لَهُمۡ سَمۡعࣰ ا وَأَبۡصَٰرࣰ ا وَأَفۡـِٔدَةࣰ فَمَآ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنۡهُمۡ سَمۡعُهُمۡ وَلَآ أَبۡصَٰرُهُمۡ وَلَآ أَفۡـِٔدَتُهُم مِّن شَيۡءٍ إِذۡ كَانُواْ يَجۡحَدُونَ بِـَٔايَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ وَحَاقَ بِهِم مَّا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُونَ
t: Walaqad makkannahum feema in makkannakum feehi wajaAAalna lahum samAAan waabsaran waafidatan fama aghna AAanhum samAAuhum wala absaruhum wala afidatuhum min shayin ith kanoo yajhadoona biayati Allahi wahaqa bihim ma kanoo bihi yastahzioona
u: Unko humne woh kuch diya tha jo tum logon ko nahin diya hai. Unko humne kaan, aankehin aur dil sab kuch de rakkhe thay, magar na woh kaan unke kisi kaam aaye, na aankhein, na dil, kyunke woh Allah ki aayat ka inkar karte thay, aur usi cheez ke phair mein woh aa gaye jiska woh mazaak udate thay

ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا مَا حَوۡلَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡقُرَىٰ وَصَرَّفۡنَا ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَرۡجِعُونَ
t: Walaqad ahlakna ma hawlakum mina alqura wasarrafna alayati laAAallahum yarjiAAoona
u: Tumhare gird o pesh ke ilakon mein bahut se bastiyon ko hum halaak kar chuke hain. Humne apni aayat bhej kar baar baar tarah tarah se unko samjhaya, shayad ke woh baaz aa jayein

ar: فَلَوۡلَا نَصَرَهُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّخَذُواْ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ قُرۡبَانًا ءَالِهَةَۢۖ بَلۡ ضَلُّواْ عَنۡهُمۡۚ وَذَٰلِكَ إِفۡكُهُمۡ وَمَا كَانُواْ يَفۡتَرُونَ
t: Falawla nasarahumu allatheena ittakhathoo min dooni Allahi qurbanan alihatan bal dalloo AAanhum wathalika ifkuhum wama kanoo yaftaroona
u: Phir kyun na un hastiyon ne unki madad ki jinhein Allah ko chodh kar unhon ne taqarrub-e-ilallah ka zariya samajhte huey maabood bana liya tha? Balke woh to unsey khoye gaye. Aur yeh tha unke jhoot aur un banawati aqeedon ka anjaam jo unhon ne ghadh rakkhe thay

ar: وَإِذۡ صَرَفۡنَآ إِلَيۡكَ نَفَرࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱلۡجِنِّ يَسۡتَمِعُونَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ فَلَمَّا حَضَرُوهُ قَالُوٓاْ أَنصِتُواْۖ فَلَمَّا قُضِيَ وَلَّوۡاْ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِم مُّنذِرِينَ
t: Waith sarafna ilayka nafaran mina aljinni yastamiAAoona alqurana falamma hadaroohu qaloo ansitoo falamma qudiya wallaw ila qawmihim munthireena
u: (Aur woh waqiya bhi qabil e zikar hai) jab hum Jinno ke ek girooh ko tumhari taraf le aaye thay taa-ke Quran sunein. Jab woh us jagaah pahunche (jahan tum Quraan padh rahe thay) to unhon ne aapas mein kaha khamosh ho jao, phir jab woh padha ja chukka to woh khabardar karne walay ban kar apni qaum ki taraf palte(returned)

ar: قَالُواْ يَٰقَوۡمَنَآ إِنَّا سَمِعۡنَا كِتَٰبًا أُنزِلَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مُوسَىٰ مُصَدِّقࣰ ا لِّمَا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡهِ يَهۡدِيٓ إِلَى ٱلۡحَقِّ وَإِلَىٰ طَرِيقࣲ مُّسۡتَقِيمࣲ‏
t: Qaloo ya qawmana inna samiAAna kitaban onzila min baAAdi moosa musaddiqan lima bayna yadayhi yahdee ila alhaqqi waila tareeqin mustaqeemin
u: Unhon ne jaa kar kaha “aey hamari qaum ke logon, humne ek kitaab suni hai jo Moosa ke baad naazil ki gayi hai, tasdeeq(confirm) karne wali hai apne se pehle aayi hui kitaabon ki, rehnumayi karti hai haqq aur raah-e-raast ki taraf

ar: يَٰقَوۡمَنَآ أَجِيبُواْ دَاعِيَ ٱللَّهِ وَءَامِنُواْ بِهِۦ يَغۡفِرۡ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمۡ وَيُجِرۡكُم مِّنۡ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمࣲ‏
t: Ya qawmana ajeeboo daAAiya Allahi waaminoo bihi yaghfir lakum min thunoobikum wayujirkum min AAathabin aleemin
u: Aey hamari qaum ke logon, Allah ki taraf bulane waley ki dawat qabool karlo aur ispar imaan le aao, Allah tumhare gunaahon se darguzar famayega aur tumhein azaab e aleem se bacha dega”

ar: وَمَن لَّا يُجِبۡ دَاعِيَ ٱللَّهِ فَلَيۡسَ بِمُعۡجِزࣲ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَيۡسَ لَهُۥ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوۡلِيَآءُۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ فِي ضَلَٰلࣲ مُّبِينٍ
t: Waman la yujib daAAiya Allahi falaysa bimuAAjizin fee alardi walaysa lahu min doonihi awliyaa olaika fee dalalin mubeenin
u: Aur jo koi Allah ke daai (one who calls to Allah) ki baat na maane woh na zameen mein khud koi bal boota rakhta hai ke Allah ko zach(frustrate) karde, aur na uske koi aise haami-o-sarparast (protector) hain ke Allah se usko bacha lein. Aisey log khuli gumraahi mein padey huey hain

ar: أَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَلَمۡ يَعۡيَ بِخَلۡقِهِنَّ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحۡـِۧيَ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰۚ بَلَىٰٓۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءࣲ قَدِيرࣱ‏
t: Awalam yaraw anna Allaha allathee khalaqa alssamawati waalarda walam yaAAya bikhalqihinna biqadirin AAala an yuhyiya almawta bala innahu AAala kulli shayin qadeerun
u: Aur kya in logon ko yeh sujhayi nahin deta ke jis khuda ne yeh zameen aur aasmaan paida kiye hain aur inko banate huey jo na thaka, woh zaroor ispar qadir hai ke murdon (dead) ko jila uthaye? Kyun nahin, yaqeenan woh har cheez ki qudrat rakhta hai

ar: وَيَوۡمَ يُعۡرَضُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ أَلَيۡسَ هَٰذَا بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ وَرَبِّنَاۚ قَالَ فَذُوقُواْ ٱلۡعَذَابَ بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَكۡفُرُونَ
t: Wayawma yuAAradu allatheena kafaroo AAala alnnari alaysa hatha bialhaqqi qaloo bala warabbina qala fathooqoo alAAathaba bima kuntum takfuroona
u: Jis roz yeh kaafir aag ke saamne laye jayenge , us waqt unsey pucha jayega “ kya yeh haqq nahin hai?” yeh kahenge “ haan, hamare Rubb ki kasam (yeh waqai haqq hai)” Allah farmayega “ accha to ab azaab ka mazaa chakkho apne us inkar ki padash mein jo tum karte rahe thay”

ar: فَٱصۡبِرۡ كَمَا صَبَرَ أُوْلُواْ ٱلۡعَزۡمِ مِنَ ٱلرُّسُلِ وَلَا تَسۡتَعۡجِل لَّهُمۡۚ كَأَنَّهُمۡ يَوۡمَ يَرَوۡنَ مَا يُوعَدُونَ لَمۡ يَلۡبَثُوٓاْ إِلَّا سَاعَةࣰ مِّن نَّهَارِۭۚ بَلَٰغࣱۚ فَهَلۡ يُهۡلَكُ إِلَّا ٱلۡقَوۡمُ ٱلۡفَٰسِقُونَ
t: Faisbir kama sabara oloo alAAazmi mina alrrusuli wala tastaAAjil lahum kaannahum yawma yarawna ma yooAAadoona lam yalbathoo illa saAAatan min naharin balaghun fahal yuhlaku illa alqawmu alfasiqoona
u: Pas aey Nabi, sabr karo jis tarhan ulul azm (strong will) Rasoolon ne sabr kiya hai, aur inke maamle mein jaldi na karo. Jis roz yeh log us cheez ko dekh lenge jiska inhein khauff dilaya ja raha hai to inhein yun maloon hoga ke jaise duniya mein din ki ek ghadi bhar se zyada nahin rahey thay. Baat pahuncha di gayi, ab kya nafarmaan logon ke siwa aur koi halak hoga

ar: ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَصَدُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ أَضَلَّ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ
t: Allatheena kafaroo wasaddoo AAan sabeeli Allahi adalla aAAmalahum
u: Jin logon ne kufr kiya aur Allah ke raaste se roka Allah ne unke aamal ko raigaan (waste /vain) kardiya

ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَءَامَنُواْ بِمَا نُزِّلَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدࣲ وَهُوَ ٱلۡحَقُّ مِن رَّبِّهِمۡ كَفَّرَ عَنۡهُمۡ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمۡ وَأَصۡلَحَ بَالَهُمۡ
t: Waallatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati waamanoo bima nuzzila AAala muhammadin wahuwa alhaqqu min rabbihim kaffara AAanhum sayyiatihim waaslaha balahum
u: Aur jo log imaan laye aur jinhon ne neik aamal kiye aur us cheez ko maan liya jo Muhammad par nazil hui hai aur hai woh sarasar haqq unke Rubb ki taraf se Allah ne unki burayian (evil deeds) unse dur kardi aur unka haal durust kardiya

ar: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ ٱتَّبَعُواْ ٱلۡبَٰطِلَ وَأَنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ ٱتَّبَعُواْ ٱلۡحَقَّ مِن رَّبِّهِمۡۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ ٱللَّهُ لِلنَّاسِ أَمۡثَٰلَهُمۡ
t: Thalika bianna allatheena kafaroo ittabaAAoo albatila waanna allatheena amanoo ittabaAAoo alhaqqa min rabbihim kathalika yadribu Allahu lilnnasi amthalahum
u: Yeh is liye ke kufr karne walon ne baatil (falsehood) ki pairwi ki aur imaan lane walon ne us haqq ki pairwi ki jo unke Rubb ki taraf se aaya hai. Is tarhaan Allah logon ko unki theek theek haisiyat bataye deta hai

ar: فَإِذَا لَقِيتُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ فَضَرۡبَ ٱلرِّقَابِ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَثۡخَنتُمُوهُمۡ فَشُدُّواْ ٱلۡوَثَاقَ فَإِمَّا مَنَّۢا بَعۡدُ وَإِمَّا فِدَآءً حَتَّىٰ تَضَعَ ٱلۡحَرۡبُ أَوۡزَارَهَاۚ ذَٰلِكَۖ وَلَوۡ يَشَآءُ ٱللَّهُ لَٱنتَصَرَ مِنۡهُمۡ وَلَٰكِن لِّيَبۡلُوَاْ بَعۡضَكُم بِبَعۡضࣲۗ وَٱلَّذِينَ قُتِلُواْ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ فَلَن يُضِلَّ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ
t: Faitha laqeetumu allatheena kafaroo fadarba alrriqabi hatta itha athkhantumoohum fashuddoo alwathaqa faimma mannan baAAdu waimma fidaan hatta tadaAAa alharbu awzaraha thalika walaw yashao Allahu laintasara minhum walakin liyabluwa baAAdakum bibaAAdin waallatheena qutiloo fee sabeeli Allahi falan yudilla aAAmalahum
u: Pas jab in kafiron se tumhari muth-bhaid (battle) ho to pehla kaam gardanein (necks) maarna hai, yahan tak ke jab tum unko acchi tarah kuchal do tab qaidiyon (captives) ko mazboot baandho. Iske baad (tumhein ikhtiyar hai) ehsan karo ya fidiye (ransom) ka muaamla karlo, taa-aanke ladayi apne hatiyar daal de. Yeh hai tumhare karne ka kaam. Allah chahta to khud hi unse nimat leta, magar (yeh tareeqa us ne is liye ikhtiyar kiya hai) taa-ke tum logon ko ek dusre ke zariye se aazmaye aur jo log Allah ki raah mein maarey jayenge Allah unke aamal ko hargiz zaya na karega

ar: سَيَهۡدِيهِمۡ وَيُصۡلِحُ بَالَهُمۡ
t: Sayahdeehim wayuslihu balahum
u: Woh unki rehnumayi farmayega, unka haal durust kardega

ar: وَيُدۡخِلُهُمُ ٱلۡجَنَّةَ عَرَّفَهَا لَهُمۡ
t: Wayudkhiluhumu aljannata AAarrafaha lahum
u: Aur unko us jannat mein daakhil karega jissey woh unko waqif kara chuka hai

ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِن تَنصُرُواْ ٱللَّهَ يَنصُرۡكُمۡ وَيُثَبِّتۡ أَقۡدَامَكُمۡ
t: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo in tansuroo Allaha yansurkum wayuthabbit aqdamakum
u: Aey logon jo imaan laye ho, agar tum Allah ki madad karoge to woh tumhari madad karega aur tumhare qadam mazboot jamaa dega

ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ فَتَعۡسࣰ ا لَّهُمۡ وَأَضَلَّ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ
t: Waallatheena kafaroo fataAAsan lahum waadalla aAAmalahum
u: Rahe woh log jinhon ne kufr kiya hai, to unke liye halakat hai aur Allah ne unke aamal ko bhatka diya hai

ar: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمۡ كَرِهُواْ مَآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ فَأَحۡبَطَ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ
t: Thalika biannahum karihoo ma anzala Allahu faahbata aAAmalahum
u: Kyunke unhon ne us cheez ko napasand kiya jisey Allah ne naazil kiya hai, lihaza Allah ne unke aamal zaya (waste) kardiye

ar: ۞أَفَلَمۡ يَسِيرُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَيَنظُرُواْ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡۖ دَمَّرَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡهِمۡۖ وَلِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ أَمۡثَٰلُهَا
t: Afalam yaseeroo fee alardi fayanthuroo kayfa kana AAaqibatu allatheena min qablihim dammara Allahu AAalayhim walilkafireena amthaluha
u: Kya woh zameen mein chale phire na thay ke un logon ka anjaam dekhte jo unse pehle guzar chuke hain? Allah ne unka sab kuch unpar ulat diya, aur aise hi nataij in kaafiron ke liye muqaddar hain

ar: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ مَوۡلَى ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَأَنَّ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ لَا مَوۡلَىٰ لَهُمۡ
t: Thalika bianna Allaha mawla allatheena amanoo waanna alkafireena la mawla lahum
u: Yeh is liye ke imaan laane walon ka haami o nasir (Protector) Allah hai aur kaafiron ka haami o nasir (Protector) koi nahin

ar: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُدۡخِلُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ جَنَّٰتࣲ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُۖ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ يَتَمَتَّعُونَ وَيَأۡكُلُونَ كَمَا تَأۡكُلُ ٱلۡأَنۡعَٰمُ وَٱلنَّارُ مَثۡوࣰ ى لَّهُمۡ
t: Inna Allaha yudkhilu allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati jannatin tajree min tahtiha alanharu waallatheena kafaroo yatamattaAAoona wayakuloona kama takulu alanAAamu waalnnaru mathwan lahum
u: Iman laney walon aur neik amal karne walon ko Allah un jannaton mein daakhil karega jinke nichey nehrein behti hain, aur kufr karne waale bas duniya ki chandh roza zindagi ke mazey loot rahey hain, janwaron ki tarah kha pee rahey hain, aur unka aakhri thikana jahannum hai

ar: وَكَأَيِّن مِّن قَرۡيَةٍ هِيَ أَشَدُّ قُوَّةࣰ مِّن قَرۡيَتِكَ ٱلَّتِيٓ أَخۡرَجَتۡكَ أَهۡلَكۡنَٰهُمۡ فَلَا نَاصِرَ لَهُمۡ
t: Wakaayyin min qaryatin hiya ashaddu quwwatan min qaryatika allatee akhrajatka ahlaknahum fala nasira lahum
u: Aey Nabi (s.a.s) kitni hi bastiyan aisi guzar chuki hain jo tumhare us basti se bahut zyada zoarawar thin jisne tumhein nikal diya hai? Unhein humne is tarhaan halaak kardiya ke koi unka bachane wala na tha

ar: أَفَمَن كَانَ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةࣲ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ كَمَن زُيِّنَ لَهُۥ سُوٓءُ عَمَلِهِۦ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓاْ أَهۡوَآءَهُم
t: Afaman kana AAala bayyinatin min rabbihi kaman zuyyina lahu sooo AAamalihi waittabaAAoo ahwaahum
u: Bhala kahin aisa ho sakta hai ke jo apne Rubb ki taraf se ek saaf o sareeh hidayat par ho, woh un logon ki tarah ho jaye jinke liye unka bura amal khushnuma bana diya gaya hai aur woh apni khwahishat ke pairo ban gaye hain

ar: مَّثَلُ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ ٱلَّتِي وُعِدَ ٱلۡمُتَّقُونَۖ فِيهَآ أَنۡهَٰرࣱ مِّن مَّآءٍ غَيۡرِ ءَاسِنࣲ وَأَنۡهَٰرࣱ مِّن لَّبَنࣲ لَّمۡ يَتَغَيَّرۡ طَعۡمُهُۥ وَأَنۡهَٰرࣱ مِّنۡ خَمۡرࣲ لَّذَّةࣲ لِّلشَّٰرِبِينَ وَأَنۡهَٰرࣱ مِّنۡ عَسَلࣲ مُّصَفࣰّ ىۖ وَلَهُمۡ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ وَمَغۡفِرَةࣱ مِّن رَّبِّهِمۡۖ كَمَنۡ هُوَ خَٰلِدࣱ فِي ٱلنَّارِ وَسُقُواْ مَآءً حَمِيمࣰ ا فَقَطَّعَ أَمۡعَآءَهُمۡ
t: Mathalu aljannati allatee wuAAida almuttaqoona feeha anharun min main ghayri asinin waanharun min labanin lam yataghayyar taAAmuhu waanharun min khamrin laththatin lilshsharibeena waanharun min AAasalin musaffan walahum feeha min kulli alththamarati wamaghfiratun min rabbihim kaman huwa khalidun fee alnnari wasuqoo maan hameeman faqattaAAa amAAaahum
u: Parhezgar-on ke liye jis jannat ka waada kiya gaya hai uski shaan to yeh hai ke usmein nehrein beh rahi hongi nithre (incorruptible /unpolluted) huye pani ki, nehrein beh rahi hongi aisey doodh ki jiske mazay(taste) mein zara farq na aaya hoga, nehrein beh rahi hongi aisi sharaab ki jo peene walon ke liye lazeez (delicious) hongi, nehrein beh rahi hongi saaf shafaaf shehad (honey) ki. Usmein unke liye har taraah ke phal hongay aur unke Rubb ki taraf se bakshish. (kya woh shaks jiske hissey mein yeh jannat aane wali hai) un logon ki taraah ho sakta hai jo jahannam mein hamesha rahenge aur jinhein aisa garam(hot) pani pilaya jayega jo unke aantein (bowels) tak kaat dega

ar: وَمِنۡهُم مَّن يَسۡتَمِعُ إِلَيۡكَ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا خَرَجُواْ مِنۡ عِندِكَ قَالُواْ لِلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡعِلۡمَ مَاذَا قَالَ ءَانِفًاۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ طَبَعَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمۡ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓاْ أَهۡوَآءَهُمۡ
t: Waminhum man yastamiAAu ilayka hatta itha kharajoo min AAindika qaloo lillatheena ootoo alAAilma matha qala anifan olaika allatheena tabaAAa Allahu AAala quloobihim waittabaAAoo ahwaahum
u: In mein se kuch log aise hain jo kaan laga kar tumhari baat sunte hain aur phir jab tumhare paas se nikalte hain un logon se jinhein ilm ki niyamat bakshi gayi hai puchte hain ke abhi abhi inhon ne kya kaha tha?yeh woh log hain jinke dilon par Allah ne thappa (seal) laga diya hai aur yeh apni apni khwaishat ke pairo bane huey hain

ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱهۡتَدَوۡاْ زَادَهُمۡ هُدࣰ ى وَءَاتَىٰهُمۡ تَقۡوَىٰهُمۡ
t: Waallatheena ihtadaw zadahum hudan waatahum taqwahum
u: Rahe woh log jinhon ne hidayat payi hai, Allah unko aur zyada hidayat deta hai aur unhein unke hisse ka taqwa ata farmata hai

ar: فَهَلۡ يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا ٱلسَّاعَةَ أَن تَأۡتِيَهُم بَغۡتَةࣰۖ فَقَدۡ جَآءَ أَشۡرَاطُهَاۚ فَأَنَّىٰ لَهُمۡ إِذَا جَآءَتۡهُمۡ ذِكۡرَىٰهُمۡ
t: Fahal yanthuroona illa alssaAAata an tatiyahum baghtatan faqad jaa ashratuha faanna lahum itha jaathum thikrahum
u: Ab kya yeh log bas qayamat hi ke muntazir hain ke woh achanak inpar aa jaye? Uski alamaat to aa chuki hain jab woh khud aa jayegi to inke liye nasihat kabool karne ka kaunsa mauqa baaqi reh jayega

ar: فَٱعۡلَمۡ أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ وَٱسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لِذَنۢبِكَ وَلِلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِۗ وَٱللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ مُتَقَلَّبَكُمۡ وَمَثۡوَىٰكُمۡ
t: FaiAAlam annahu la ilaha illa Allahu waistaghfir lithanbika walilmumineena waalmuminati waAllahu yaAAlamu mutaqallabakum wamathwakum
u: Pas aey Nabi, khoob jaan lo ke Allah ke siwa koi ibadat ka mustahiq nahin hai, aur maafi maango apne kasoor ke liye bhi aur momin mardon aur auraton ke liye bhi. Allah tumhari sargarmiyon ko bhi jaanta hai aur tumhare thikane se bhi waqif hai

ar: وَيَقُولُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَوۡلَا نُزِّلَتۡ سُورَةࣱۖ فَإِذَآ أُنزِلَتۡ سُورَةࣱ مُّحۡكَمَةࣱ وَذُكِرَ فِيهَا ٱلۡقِتَالُ رَأَيۡتَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضࣱ يَنظُرُونَ إِلَيۡكَ نَظَرَ ٱلۡمَغۡشِيِّ عَلَيۡهِ مِنَ ٱلۡمَوۡتِۖ فَأَوۡلَىٰ لَهُمۡ
t: Wayaqoolu allatheena amanoo lawla nuzzilat sooratun faitha onzilat sooratun muhkamatun wathukira feeha alqitalu raayta allatheena fee quloobihim maradun yanthuroona ilayka nathara almaghshiyyi AAalayhi mina almawti faawla lahum
u: Jo log iman laye hain woh keh rahe thay ke koi surat kyun nahin nazil ki jaati (jis mein jung ka hukum diya jaye) magar jab ek mohkam surat nazil kardi gayi jismein jung ka zikr tha to tumne dekha ke jinke dilon mein bimari thi woh tumhari taraf is tarah dekh rahey hain jaise kisi par maut chaa gayi ho. Afsos unke haal par

ar: طَاعَةࣱ وَقَوۡلࣱ مَّعۡرُوفࣱۚ فَإِذَا عَزَمَ ٱلۡأَمۡرُ فَلَوۡ صَدَقُواْ ٱللَّهَ لَكَانَ خَيۡرࣰ ا لَّهُمۡ
t: TaAAatun waqawlun maAAroofun faitha AAazama alamru falaw sadaqoo Allaha lakana khayran lahum
u: (Unki zubaan par hai) itaat ka ikrar aur acchi acchi batein. Magar jab qataii hukum de diya gaya us waqt woh Allah se apne ahad mein sacche nikalte to unhi ke liye accha tha

ar: فَهَلۡ عَسَيۡتُمۡ إِن تَوَلَّيۡتُمۡ أَن تُفۡسِدُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَتُقَطِّعُوٓاْ أَرۡحَامَكُمۡ
t: Fahal AAasaytum in tawallaytum an tufsidoo fee alardi watuqattiAAoo arhamakum
u: Ab kya tum logon se iske siwa kuch aur tawaqqu ki ja sakti hai ke agar tum ulte mooh phir gaye to zameen mein phir fasad barpa karoge aur aapas mein ek dusre ke galay (throats) kaatoge

ar: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَعَنَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ فَأَصَمَّهُمۡ وَأَعۡمَىٰٓ أَبۡصَٰرَهُمۡ
t: Olaika allatheena laAAanahumu Allahu faasammahum waaAAma absarahum
u: Yeh log hain jinpar Allah ne laanat ki aur inko andha (blind) aur behra bana diya

ar: أَفَلَا يَتَدَبَّرُونَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ أَمۡ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبٍ أَقۡفَالُهَآ
t: Afala yatadabbaroona alqurana am AAala quloobin aqfaluha
u: Kya un logon ne Quran par gaur nahin kiya, ya dilon par unke qufal (locks) chade huey hain

ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱرۡتَدُّواْ عَلَىٰٓ أَدۡبَٰرِهِم مِّنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا تَبَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلۡهُدَى ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنُ سَوَّلَ لَهُمۡ وَأَمۡلَىٰ لَهُمۡ
t: Inna allatheena irtaddoo AAala adbarihim min baAAdi ma tabayyana lahumu alhuda alshshaytanu sawwala lahum waamla lahum
u: Haqeeqat yeh hai ke jo log hidayat wazeh ho jaane ke baad ussey phir gaye unke liye shaytan ne is rawish ko sahal bana diya hai aur jhuti tawaqquat ka silsila unke liye daraaz kar rakkha hai

ar: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمۡ قَالُواْ لِلَّذِينَ كَرِهُواْ مَا نَزَّلَ ٱللَّهُ سَنُطِيعُكُمۡ فِي بَعۡضِ ٱلۡأَمۡرِۖ وَٱللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ إِسۡرَارَهُمۡ
t: Thalika biannahum qaloo lillatheena karihoo ma nazzala Allahu sanuteeAAukum fee baAAdi alamri waAllahu yaAAlamu israrahum
u: Is liye unhon ne Allah ke nazil karda deen ko napasand karne walon se kehdiya ke baaz maamlaat mein hum tumhari manenge.Allah unki yeh khufiya baatein khoob jaanta hai

ar: فَكَيۡفَ إِذَا تَوَفَّتۡهُمُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ يَضۡرِبُونَ وُجُوهَهُمۡ وَأَدۡبَٰرَهُمۡ
t: Fakayfa itha tawaffathumu almalaikatu yadriboona wujoohahum waadbarahum
u: Phir us waqt kya haal hoga jab farishtey inki roohein qabz karenge aur inke mooh aur peethon (backs) par maarte huey inhein le jayenge

ar: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمُ ٱتَّبَعُواْ مَآ أَسۡخَطَ ٱللَّهَ وَكَرِهُواْ رِضۡوَٰنَهُۥ فَأَحۡبَطَ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ
t: Thalika biannahumu ittabaAAoo ma askhata Allaha wakarihoo ridwanahu faahbata aAAmalahum
u: Yeh isi liye to hoga ke inhon ne us tariqe ki pairwi ki jo Allah ko naraaz karne wala hai aur us ki raza ka raasta ikhtiyar karna pasand na kiya. Isi bina par usne inke sab aamaal zaya kar diye

ar: أَمۡ حَسِبَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ أَن لَّن يُخۡرِجَ ٱللَّهُ أَضۡغَٰنَهُمۡ
t: Am hasiba allatheena fee quloobihim maradun an lan yukhrija Allahu adghanahum
u: Kya woh log jinke dilon mein bimari hai yeh samjhe baithe hain ke Allah unke dilon ke khot (keena) zahir nahin karega

ar: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَأَرَيۡنَٰكَهُمۡ فَلَعَرَفۡتَهُم بِسِيمَٰهُمۡۚ وَلَتَعۡرِفَنَّهُمۡ فِي لَحۡنِ ٱلۡقَوۡلِۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ أَعۡمَٰلَكُمۡ
t: Walaw nashao laaraynakahum falaAAaraftahum biseemahum walataAArifannahum fee lahni alqawli waAllahu yaAAlamu aAAmalakum
u: Hum chahein to unhein tumko aankhon se dikha dein aur unke chehron se tum unko pehchaan lo magar unke andaaz e kalaam se to tum unko jaan hi logay.Allah tum sab ke aamal se khoob waqif hai

ar: وَلَنَبۡلُوَنَّكُمۡ حَتَّىٰ نَعۡلَمَ ٱلۡمُجَٰهِدِينَ مِنكُمۡ وَٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ وَنَبۡلُوَاْ أَخۡبَارَكُمۡ
t: Walanabluwannakum hatta naAAlama almujahideena minkum waalssabireena wanabluwa akhbarakum
u: Hum zaroor tum logon ko aazmaish mein dalenge taake tumhare halaat ki jaanch karein aur dekh lein ke tum mein mujahid aur sabit qadam kaun hain

ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَصَدُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَشَآقُّواْ ٱلرَّسُولَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا تَبَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلۡهُدَىٰ لَن يَضُرُّواْ ٱللَّهَ شَيۡـࣰٔ ا وَسَيُحۡبِطُ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ
t: Inna allatheena kafaroo wasaddoo AAan sabeeli Allahi washaqqoo alrrasoola min baAAdi ma tabayyana lahumu alhuda lan yaduroo Allaha shayan wasayuhbitu aAAmalahum
u: Jin logon ne kufr kiya aur Allah ki raah se roaka aur Rasool se jhagda kiya jabke unpar raah e raast wazeh ho chuki thi, dar haqeeqat woh Allah ka koi nuksan bhi nahin kar sakte, balke Allah hi unka sab kiya karaya gaarat (null / fruitless) kardega

ar: ۞يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَطِيعُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُواْ ٱلرَّسُولَ وَلَا تُبۡطِلُوٓاْ أَعۡمَٰلَكُمۡ
t: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo ateeAAoo Allaha waateeAAoo alrrasoola wala tubtiloo aAAmalakum
u: Aey logon jo iman laye ho, Tum Allah ki itaat karo aur Rasool ki itaat karo aur apne aamal ko barbaad na karlo

ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَصَدُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ مَاتُواْ وَهُمۡ كُفَّارࣱ فَلَن يَغۡفِرَ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمۡ
t: Inna allatheena kafaroo wasaddoo AAan sabeeli Allahi thumma matoo wahum kuffarun falan yaghfira Allahu lahum
u: Kufr karne walon aur raah e khuda se roakne walon aur marte dum tak kufr par jamey rehne walon ko to Allah hargiz maaf na karega

ar: فَلَا تَهِنُواْ وَتَدۡعُوٓاْ إِلَى ٱلسَّلۡمِ وَأَنتُمُ ٱلۡأَعۡلَوۡنَ وَٱللَّهُ مَعَكُمۡ وَلَن يَتِرَكُمۡ أَعۡمَٰلَكُمۡ
t: Fala tahinoo watadAAoo ila alssalmi waantumu alaAAlawna waAllahu maAAakum walan yatirakum aAAmalakum
u: Pas tum bodeyh (faint-hearted) na bano aur sulah ki darkhwast na karo. Tum hi ghalib rehne wale ho. Allah tumhare saath hai aur tumhare aamal ko woh hargiz zaya na karega

ar: إِنَّمَا ٱلۡحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنۡيَا لَعِبࣱ وَلَهۡوࣱۚ وَإِن تُؤۡمِنُواْ وَتَتَّقُواْ يُؤۡتِكُمۡ أُجُورَكُمۡ وَلَا يَسۡـَٔلۡكُمۡ أَمۡوَٰلَكُمۡ
t: Innama alhayatu alddunya laAAibun walahwun wain tuminoo watattaqoo yutikum ojoorakum wala yasalkum amwalakum
u: Yeh duniya ki zindagi to ek khel aur tamasha hai agar tum imaan rakkho aur taqwe ki rawish par chalte raho to Allah tumhare ajar tumko dega aur woh tumhare maal tumse na maange ga

ar: إِن يَسۡـَٔلۡكُمُوهَا فَيُحۡفِكُمۡ تَبۡخَلُواْ وَيُخۡرِجۡ أَضۡغَٰنَكُمۡ
t: In yasalkumooha fayuhfikum tabkhaloo wayukhrij adghanakum
u: Agar kahin woh tumhare maal tumse maang le aur sab ke sab tumse talab karle to tum bukhal (kanjoosi /niggardly /miserly) karoge aur woh tumhare khot (failings) ubhar layega

ar: هَٰٓأَنتُمۡ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ تُدۡعَوۡنَ لِتُنفِقُواْ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ فَمِنكُم مَّن يَبۡخَلُۖ وَمَن يَبۡخَلۡ فَإِنَّمَا يَبۡخَلُ عَن نَّفۡسِهِۦۚ وَٱللَّهُ ٱلۡغَنِيُّ وَأَنتُمُ ٱلۡفُقَرَآءُۚ وَإِن تَتَوَلَّوۡاْ يَسۡتَبۡدِلۡ قَوۡمًا غَيۡرَكُمۡ ثُمَّ لَا يَكُونُوٓاْ أَمۡثَٰلَكُم
t: Haantum haolai tudAAawna litunfiqoo fee sabeeli Allahi faminkum man yabkhalu waman yabkhal fainnama yabkhalu AAan nafsihi waAllahu alghaniyyu waantumu alfuqarao wain tatawallaw yastabdil qawman ghayrakum thumma la yakoonoo amthalakum
u: Dekho, tum logon ko dawat di jaa rahi hai ke Allah ki raah mein maal kharch karo ispar tum mein se kuch log hain jo bukhal (niggardly / kanjoosi) kar rahe hain. Halaanke jo bukhal (niggardly) karta hai woh dar haqeeqat apne aap hi se bukhal kar raha hai. Allah to Gani (all-Sufficient) hai, tumhi uske mohtaj ho. Agar tum mooh moadoge to Allah tumhari jagah kisi aur qaum ko le aayega aur woh tum jaise na hongey

ar: إِنَّا فَتَحۡنَا لَكَ فَتۡحࣰ ا مُّبِينࣰ ا
t: Inna fatahna laka fathan mubeenan
u: Aey Nabi, humne tumko khuli fatah ata kardi

ar: لِّيَغۡفِرَ لَكَ ٱللَّهُ مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِن ذَنۢبِكَ وَمَا تَأَخَّرَ وَيُتِمَّ نِعۡمَتَهُۥ عَلَيۡكَ وَيَهۡدِيَكَ صِرَٰطࣰ ا مُّسۡتَقِيمࣰ ا
t: Liyaghfira laka Allahu ma taqaddama min thanbika wama taakhkhara wayutimma niAAmatahu AAalayka wayahdiyaka siratan mustaqeeman
u: Taa-ke Allah tumhari agli pichli har kotahi se dargurzar farmaye, aur tumpar apni niyamat ki takmeel(poori) karde, aur tumhein seedha rasta dikhaye

ar: وَيَنصُرَكَ ٱللَّهُ نَصۡرًا عَزِيزًا
t: Wayansuraka Allahu nasran AAazeezan
u: Aur tumko zabardast nusrat bakhshe

ar: هُوَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَنزَلَ ٱلسَّكِينَةَ فِي قُلُوبِ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ لِيَزۡدَادُوٓاْ إِيمَٰنࣰ ا مَّعَ إِيمَٰنِهِمۡۗ وَلِلَّهِ جُنُودُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمࣰ ا
t: Huwa allathee anzala alssakeenata fee quloobi almumineena liyazdadoo eemanan maAAa eemanihim walillahi junoodu alssamawati waalardi wakana Allahu AAaleeman hakeeman
u: Wahi hai jisne momino ke dilon mein sakinat ((Tranquility) nazil farmayi taa-ke apne imaan ke saath woh ek iman aur bada lein. Zameen aur aasmano ke sab lashkar Allah ke kabza-e-qudrat mein hain, aur woh Aleem o Hakeem hai

ar: لِّيُدۡخِلَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِ جَنَّٰتࣲ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا وَيُكَفِّرَ عَنۡهُمۡ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمۡۚ وَكَانَ ذَٰلِكَ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ فَوۡزًا عَظِيمࣰ ا
t: Liyudkhila almumineena waalmuminati jannatin tajree min tahtiha alanharu khalideena feeha wayukaffira AAanhum sayyiatihim wakana thalika AAinda Allahi fawzan AAatheeman
u: (Usne yeh kaam is liye kiya hai) taa-ke momin mardon aur auraton ko hamesha rehne ke liye aisi jannaton mein daakhil farmaye jinke nichey nehrein beh rahi hongi aur unki buraiyan unse dur karde. Allah ke nazdeek yeh badi kamiyabi hai

ar: وَيُعَذِّبَ ٱلۡمُنَٰفِقِينَ وَٱلۡمُنَٰفِقَٰتِ وَٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ وَٱلۡمُشۡرِكَٰتِ ٱلظَّآنِّينَ بِٱللَّهِ ظَنَّ ٱلسَّوۡءِۚ عَلَيۡهِمۡ دَآئِرَةُ ٱلسَّوۡءِۖ وَغَضِبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَعَنَهُمۡ وَأَعَدَّ لَهُمۡ جَهَنَّمَۖ وَسَآءَتۡ مَصِيرࣰ ا
t: WayuAAaththiba almunafiqeena waalmunafiqati waalmushrikeena waalmushrikati alththanneena biAllahi thanna alssawi AAalayhim dairatu alssawi waghadiba Allahu AAalayhim walaAAanahum waaAAadda lahum jahannama wasaat maseeran
u: Aur un munafiq mardon aur auraton aur mushrik mardon aur auraton ko saza de jo Allah ke mutaliq burey gumaan rakhte hain. Burayi ke phair mein woh khud hi aa gaye hain, Allah ka gazab unpar hua aur usne unpar laanat ki aur unke liye jahannum muhayya kardi jo bahut hi bura thikana hai

ar: وَلِلَّهِ جُنُودُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَزِيزًا حَكِيمًا
t: Walillahi junoodu alssamawati waalardi wakana Allahu AAazeezan hakeeman
u: Zameen aur aasamano ke lashkar Allah hi ke qabza-e-qudrat mein hain aur woh zabardast aur hakeem(wise) hai

ar: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَٰكَ شَٰهِدࣰ ا وَمُبَشِّرࣰ ا وَنَذِيرࣰ ا
t: Inna arsalnaka shahidan wamubashshiran wanatheeran
u: Aey Nabi hunme tumko shahadat(witness) dene wala basharat(good news) dene wala aur khabardar kardene wala bana kar bheja hai

ar: لِّتُؤۡمِنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَتُعَزِّرُوهُ وَتُوَقِّرُوهُۚ وَتُسَبِّحُوهُ بُكۡرَةࣰ وَأَصِيلًا
t: Lituminoo biAllahi warasoolihi watuAAazziroohu watuwaqqiroohu watusabbihoohu bukratan waaseelan
u: Taa-ke aey logon , tum Allah aur uske Rasool par imaan lao aur uska saath do, uski taazim-o-tauqeer(support him, and revere ) karo aur subah o shaam uski tasbeeh karte raho

ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُبَايِعُونَكَ إِنَّمَا يُبَايِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ يَدُ ٱللَّهِ فَوۡقَ أَيۡدِيهِمۡۚ فَمَن نَّكَثَ فَإِنَّمَا يَنكُثُ عَلَىٰ نَفۡسِهِۦۖ وَمَنۡ أَوۡفَىٰ بِمَا عَٰهَدَ عَلَيۡهُ ٱللَّهَ فَسَيُؤۡتِيهِ أَجۡرًا عَظِيمࣰ ا
t: Inna allatheena yubayiAAoonaka innama yubayiAAoona Allaha yadu Allahi fawqa aydeehim faman nakatha fainnama yankuthu AAala nafsihi waman awfa bima AAahada AAalayhu Allaha fasayuteehi ajran AAatheeman
u: Aey Nabi, jo log tumse bayt kar rahe thay(pledge allegiance to you) woh dar asal Allah se bayt kar rahey thay. Unke haath par Allah ka haath tha. Ab jo is ahad ko todeyga uski ahad shikani ka wabal uski apni hi zaat par hoga, aur jo us ahad ko wafa karega jo usne Allah se kiya hai, Allah ankqareeb usko bada ajar ata farmayega

ar: سَيَقُولُ لَكَ ٱلۡمُخَلَّفُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَعۡرَابِ شَغَلَتۡنَآ أَمۡوَٰلُنَا وَأَهۡلُونَا فَٱسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لَنَاۚ يَقُولُونَ بِأَلۡسِنَتِهِم مَّا لَيۡسَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمۡۚ قُلۡ فَمَن يَمۡلِكُ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيۡـًٔا إِنۡ أَرَادَ بِكُمۡ ضَرًّا أَوۡ أَرَادَ بِكُمۡ نَفۡعَۢاۚ بَلۡ كَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرَۢا
t: Sayaqoolu laka almukhallafoona mina alaAArabi shaghalatna amwaluna waahloona faistaghfir lana yaqooloona bialsinatihim ma laysa fee quloobihim qul faman yamliku lakum mina Allahi shayan in arada bikum darran aw arada bikum nafAAan bal kana Allahu bima taAAmaloona khabeeran
u: Aey Nabi, badwi (bedouns) arabon mein se jo log pichey chodh diye gaye thay ab woh aa kar zaroor tumse kahenge ke humein apne amwal aur baal bacchon ki fikr ne mashgul kar rakkha tha. Aap hamare liye magfirat ki dua famayein. Yeh log apni zubaano se woh baatein kehte hain jo unke dilon mein nahin hoti. Unse kehna “acha, yahi baat hai to kaun tumhare maamle mein Allah ke faisle ko rok dene ka kuch bhi ikhtiyar rakhta hai agar woh tumhein koi nuksan pahunchana chahey ya nafa bakshna chahe? Tumhare aamal se to Allah hi ba-khabar hai

ar: بَلۡ ظَنَنتُمۡ أَن لَّن يَنقَلِبَ ٱلرَّسُولُ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِيهِمۡ أَبَدࣰ ا وَزُيِّنَ ذَٰلِكَ فِي قُلُوبِكُمۡ وَظَنَنتُمۡ ظَنَّ ٱلسَّوۡءِ وَكُنتُمۡ قَوۡمَۢا بُورࣰ ا
t: Bal thanantum an lan yanqaliba alrrasoolu waalmuminoona ila ahleehim abadan wazuyyina thalika fee quloobikum wathanantum thanna alssawi wakuntum qawman booran
u: (Magar asal baat woh nahin hai jo tum keh rahey ho) balke tumne yun samjha ke Rasool aur mominin apne ghar walon mein hargiz palat kar na aa sakenge aur yeh khayal tumhare dilon ko bahut bhala laga. Aur tumne bahut burey guman kiye aur tum sakht badh batin (immensely evil) log ho”

ar: وَمَن لَّمۡ يُؤۡمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ فَإِنَّآ أَعۡتَدۡنَا لِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ سَعِيرࣰ ا
t: Waman lam yumin biAllahi warasoolihi fainna aAAtadna lilkafireena saAAeeran
u: Allah aur uske Rasool par jo log imaan na rakhte hon aisey kaafiron ke liye humne bhadakti aag muhaiyya kar rakkhi hai

ar: وَلِلَّهِ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ يَغۡفِرُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيُعَذِّبُ مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ غَفُورࣰ ا رَّحِيمࣰ ا
t: Walillahi mulku alssamawati waalardi yaghfiru liman yashao wayuAAaththibu man yashao wakana Allahu ghafooran raheeman
u: Aasmano aur zameen ki badshahi ka maalik Allah hi hai. Jisey chahe maaf karey aur jisey chahe saza de. Aur woh Gafoor o Raheem hai

ar: سَيَقُولُ ٱلۡمُخَلَّفُونَ إِذَا ٱنطَلَقۡتُمۡ إِلَىٰ مَغَانِمَ لِتَأۡخُذُوهَا ذَرُونَا نَتَّبِعۡكُمۡۖ يُرِيدُونَ أَن يُبَدِّلُواْ كَلَٰمَ ٱللَّهِۚ قُل لَّن تَتَّبِعُونَا كَذَٰلِكُمۡ قَالَ ٱللَّهُ مِن قَبۡلُۖ فَسَيَقُولُونَ بَلۡ تَحۡسُدُونَنَاۚ بَلۡ كَانُواْ لَا يَفۡقَهُونَ إِلَّا قَلِيلࣰ ا
t: Sayaqoolu almukhallafoona itha intalaqtum ila maghanima litakhuthooha tharoona nattabiAAkum yureedoona an yubaddiloo kalama Allahi qul lan tattabiAAoona kathalikum qala Allahu min qablu fasayaqooloona bal tahsudoonana bal kanoo la yafqahoona illa qaleelan
u: Jab tum maal-e-ganimat hasil karne ke liye jane lagoge to yeh pichey chodey jane waley log tumse zaroor kahenge ke humein bhi apne saath chalne do. Yeh chahte hain ke Allah ke farmaan ko badal dein. Inse saaf keh dena ke “Tum hargiz hamare saath nahin chal sakte. Allah pehle hi yeh farma chuka hai” yeh kahenge ke “nahin, balke tumlog humse hasad kar rahey ho” (halanke baat hasad ki nahin hai) balke yeh log sahih baat ko kam hi samajhte hain

ar: قُل لِّلۡمُخَلَّفِينَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَعۡرَابِ سَتُدۡعَوۡنَ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمٍ أُوْلِي بَأۡسࣲ شَدِيدࣲ تُقَٰتِلُونَهُمۡ أَوۡ يُسۡلِمُونَۖ فَإِن تُطِيعُواْ يُؤۡتِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ أَجۡرًا حَسَنࣰ اۖ وَإِن تَتَوَلَّوۡاْ كَمَا تَوَلَّيۡتُم مِّن قَبۡلُ يُعَذِّبۡكُمۡ عَذَابًا أَلِيمࣰ ا
t: Qul lilmukhallafeena mina alaAArabi satudAAawna ila qawmin olee basin shadeedin tuqatiloonahum aw yuslimoona fain tuteeAAoo yutikumu Allahu ajran hasanan wain tatawallaw kama tawallaytum min qablu yuAAaththibkum AAathaban aleeman
u: In pichey chodey janey waley badwi(bedouin) arabon se kehna ke “ankareeb tumhein aisey logon se ladne ke liye bulaya jayega jo badey zoarawar hain. Tumko unse jung karni hogi ya woh mutii (surrender) ho jayenge. Us waqt agar tumne hukum e jihad ki itaat ki to Allah tumhein accha ajar dega. Aur agar tum phir usi tarah mooh moad gaye jis tarah pehle moad chuke ho to Allah tumko dardnaak saza dega

ar: لَّيۡسَ عَلَى ٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ حَرَجࣱ وَلَا عَلَى ٱلۡأَعۡرَجِ حَرَجࣱ وَلَا عَلَى ٱلۡمَرِيضِ حَرَجࣱۗ وَمَن يُطِعِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ يُدۡخِلۡهُ جَنَّٰتࣲ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُۖ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ يُعَذِّبۡهُ عَذَابًا أَلِيمࣰ ا
t: Laysa AAala alaAAma harajun wala AAala alaAAraji harajun wala AAala almareedi harajun waman yutiAAi Allaha warasoolahu yudkhilhu jannatin tajree min tahtiha alanharu waman yatawalla yuAAaththibhu AAathaban aleeman
u: Agar andha aur langda aur mareez jihad ke liye na aaye to koi haraj nahin. Jo koi Allah aur uske Rasool ki itaat karega Allah usey un jannaton mein dakhil karega jinke nichey nehrein beh rahi hongi, aur jo mooh pherega usey woh dardnaak azaab dega”

ar: ۞لَّقَدۡ رَضِيَ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ إِذۡ يُبَايِعُونَكَ تَحۡتَ ٱلشَّجَرَةِ فَعَلِمَ مَا فِي قُلُوبِهِمۡ فَأَنزَلَ ٱلسَّكِينَةَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَأَثَٰبَهُمۡ فَتۡحࣰ ا قَرِيبࣰ ا
t: Laqad radiya Allahu AAani almumineena ith yubayiAAoonaka tahta alshshajarati faAAalima ma fee quloobihim faanzala alsakeenata AAalayhim waathabahum fathan qareeban
u: Allah momino se khush ho gaya jab woh darakht ke nichey tumse bayt (swore allegiance) kar rahey thay. Unke dilon ka haal usko maloom tha. Is liye usne unpar sakinat(inner peace) nazil farmayi, unko inaam mein qareebi fatah bakshi

ar: وَمَغَانِمَ كَثِيرَةࣰ يَأۡخُذُونَهَاۗ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَزِيزًا حَكِيمࣰ ا
t: Wamaghanima katheeratan yakhuthoonaha wakana Allahu AAazeezan hakeeman
u: Aur bahut sa maal-e-ganimat unhein ata kar diya jisey woh (anqareeb) hasil karenge. Allah zabardast aur hakeem(wise) hai

ar: وَعَدَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَغَانِمَ كَثِيرَةࣰ تَأۡخُذُونَهَا فَعَجَّلَ لَكُمۡ هَٰذِهِۦ وَكَفَّ أَيۡدِيَ ٱلنَّاسِ عَنكُمۡ وَلِتَكُونَ ءَايَةࣰ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَيَهۡدِيَكُمۡ صِرَٰطࣰ ا مُّسۡتَقِيمࣰ ا
t: WaAAadakumu Allahu maghanima katheeratan takhuthoonaha faAAajjala lakum hathihi wakaffa aydiya alnnasi AAankum walitakoona ayatan lilmumineena wayahdiyakum siratan mustaqeeman
u: Allah tumse ba-kasrat amwal-e-ganimat ka wada karta hai jinhein tum hasil karoge. Fauri taur par to yeh fatah usne tumhein ata kardi aur logon ke haath tumhare khilaf uthne se roak diye, taa-ke yeh momino ke liye ek nishani ban jaye aur Allah seedhe raaste ki taraf tumhein hidayat bakshe

ar: وَأُخۡرَىٰ لَمۡ تَقۡدِرُواْ عَلَيۡهَا قَدۡ أَحَاطَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَاۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءࣲ قَدِيرࣰ ا
t: Waokhra lam taqdiroo AAalayha qad ahata Allahu biha wakana Allahu AAala kulli shayin qadeeran
u: Iske alawa dusre aur ganimaton ka bhi woh tumse waada karta hai jinpar tum abhi tak qadir nahin huey ho aur Allah ne inko gher rakkha hai, Allah har cheez par qadir hai

ar: وَلَوۡ قَٰتَلَكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَوَلَّوُاْ ٱلۡأَدۡبَٰرَ ثُمَّ لَا يَجِدُونَ وَلِيࣰّ ا وَلَا نَصِيرࣰ ا
t: Walaw qatalakumu allatheena kafaroo lawallawoo aladbara thumma la yajidoona waliyyan wala naseeran
u: Yeh kafir log agar is waqt tumse ladd gaye hotey to yaqeenan peeth pher jaatey aur koi haami o madadgaar na paate

ar: سُنَّةَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّتِي قَدۡ خَلَتۡ مِن قَبۡلُۖ وَلَن تَجِدَ لِسُنَّةِ ٱللَّهِ تَبۡدِيلࣰ ا
t: Sunnata Allahi allatee qad khalat min qablu walan tajida lisunnati Allahi tabdeelan
u: Yeh Allah ki sunnat hai jo pehle se chali aa rahi hai aur tum Allah ki sunnat mein koi tabdili na paogey

ar: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي كَفَّ أَيۡدِيَهُمۡ عَنكُمۡ وَأَيۡدِيَكُمۡ عَنۡهُم بِبَطۡنِ مَكَّةَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ أَنۡ أَظۡفَرَكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ بَصِيرًا
t: Wahuwa allathee kaffa aydiyahum AAankum waaydiyakum AAanhum bibatni makkata min baAAdi an athfarakum AAalayhim wakana Allahu bima taAAmaloona baseeran
u: Wahi hai jisne Makkah ki wadi mein unke haath tumse aur tumhare haath unse roak diye, halanke woh unpar tumhein galaba ata kar chuka tha aur jo kuch tum kar rahey thay Allah usey dekh raha tha

ar: هُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَصَدُّوكُمۡ عَنِ ٱلۡمَسۡجِدِ ٱلۡحَرَامِ وَٱلۡهَدۡيَ مَعۡكُوفًا أَن يَبۡلُغَ مَحِلَّهُۥۚ وَلَوۡلَا رِجَالࣱ مُّؤۡمِنُونَ وَنِسَآءࣱ مُّؤۡمِنَٰتࣱ لَّمۡ تَعۡلَمُوهُمۡ أَن تَطَـُٔوهُمۡ فَتُصِيبَكُم مِّنۡهُم مَّعَرَّةُۢ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمࣲۖ لِّيُدۡخِلَ ٱللَّهُ فِي رَحۡمَتِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُۚ لَوۡ تَزَيَّلُواْ لَعَذَّبۡنَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِنۡهُمۡ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
t: Humu allatheena kafaroo wasaddookum AAani almasjidi alharami waalhadya maAAkoofan an yablugha mahillahu walawla rijalun muminoona wanisaon muminatun lam taAAlamoohum an tataoohum fatuseebakum minhum maAAarratun bighayri AAilmin liyudkhila Allahu fee rahmatihi man yashao law tazayyaloo laAAaththabna allatheena kafaroo minhum AAathaban aleeman
u: Whai log to hain jinhon ne kufr kiya aur tumko masjid e haram se roka aur haadi(qurbani) ke Unton (camels) ko unki qurbani ki jagah na pahunchne diya. Agar (Makkah mein) aisey momin Mard o aurat maujood na hotay jinhein tum nahin jante, aur yeh khatra na hota ke nadanastagi mein tum unhein pamaal kardoge aur ussey tumpar haraf aayega (to jung na roaki jati. roaki woh is liye gayi) taa-ke Allah apni rehmat mein jisko chahe daakhil karle. Woh momin alag ho gaye hotey to (ehle Makkah mein se) jo kafir thay unko hum zaroor sakht saza dete

ar: إِذۡ جَعَلَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ فِي قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلۡحَمِيَّةَ حَمِيَّةَ ٱلۡجَٰهِلِيَّةِ فَأَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ سَكِينَتَهُۥ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ وَعَلَى ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَأَلۡزَمَهُمۡ كَلِمَةَ ٱلتَّقۡوَىٰ وَكَانُوٓاْ أَحَقَّ بِهَا وَأَهۡلَهَاۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيمࣰ ا
t: Ith jaAAala allatheena kafaroo fee quloobihimu alhamiyyata hamiyyata aljahiliyyati faanzala Allahu sakeenatahu AAala rasoolihi waAAala almumineena waalzamahum kalimata alttaqwa wakanoo ahaqqa biha waahlaha wakana Allahu bikulli shayin AAaleeman
u: (Yahi wajah hai ke) jab in kafiron ne apne dilon mei jaahilana hamiyat bitha li to Allah ne apne Rasool aur momino par sakinat nazil farmayi aur momino ko taqwa ki baat ka paband rakkha, ke wahi uske zyada haqdar aur uske ahel thay. Allah har cheez ka ilm rakhta hai

ar: لَّقَدۡ صَدَقَ ٱللَّهُ رَسُولَهُ ٱلرُّءۡيَا بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ لَتَدۡخُلُنَّ ٱلۡمَسۡجِدَ ٱلۡحَرَامَ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ءَامِنِينَ مُحَلِّقِينَ رُءُوسَكُمۡ وَمُقَصِّرِينَ لَا تَخَافُونَۖ فَعَلِمَ مَا لَمۡ تَعۡلَمُواْ فَجَعَلَ مِن دُونِ ذَٰلِكَ فَتۡحࣰ ا قَرِيبًا
t: Laqad sadaqa Allahu rasoolahu alrruya bialhaqqi latadkhulunna almasjida alharama in shaa Allahu amineena muhalliqeena ruoosakum wamuqassireena la takhafoona faAAalima ma lam taAAlamoo fajaAAala min dooni thalika fathan qareeban
u: Fil waqeh Allah ne apne Rasool ko saccha khwab dikhaya tha jo theek theek haqq ke mutabiq tha. Insha Allah tum zaroor masjid e haram mein purey aman ke saath dakhil hongey, apne sar mundwa-ogey (shave) aur baal tarashwa-ogey aur tumhein koi khauff na hoga. Woh us baat ko janta tha jisey tum na jante thay is liye woh khwab pura honay se pehle usne yeh qareebi fatah tumko ata farmadi

ar: هُوَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَرۡسَلَ رَسُولَهُۥ بِٱلۡهُدَىٰ وَدِينِ ٱلۡحَقِّ لِيُظۡهِرَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلدِّينِ كُلِّهِۦۚ وَكَفَىٰ بِٱللَّهِ شَهِيدࣰ ا
t: Huwa allathee arsala rasoolahu bialhuda wadeeni alhaqqi liyuthhirahu AAala alddeeni kullihi wakafa biAllahi shaheedan
u: Woh Allah hi hai jisne apne Rasool ko hidayat aur deen e haqq ke saath bheja hai taa-ke usko purey jins-e-din par gaalib karde (prevail over every religion) aur is haqeeqat par Allah ki gawahi kaafi hai

ar: مُّحَمَّدࣱ رَّسُولُ ٱللَّهِۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥٓ أَشِدَّآءُ عَلَى ٱلۡكُفَّارِ رُحَمَآءُ بَيۡنَهُمۡۖ تَرَىٰهُمۡ رُكَّعࣰ ا سُجَّدࣰ ا يَبۡتَغُونَ فَضۡلࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضۡوَٰنࣰ اۖ سِيمَاهُمۡ فِي وُجُوهِهِم مِّنۡ أَثَرِ ٱلسُّجُودِۚ ذَٰلِكَ مَثَلُهُمۡ فِي ٱلتَّوۡرَىٰةِۚ وَمَثَلُهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡإِنجِيلِ كَزَرۡعٍ أَخۡرَجَ شَطۡـَٔهُۥ فَـَٔازَرَهُۥ فَٱسۡتَغۡلَظَ فَٱسۡتَوَىٰ عَلَىٰ سُوقِهِۦ يُعۡجِبُ ٱلزُّرَّاعَ لِيَغِيظَ بِهِمُ ٱلۡكُفَّارَۗ وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ مِنۡهُم مَّغۡفِرَةࣰ وَأَجۡرًا عَظِيمَۢا
t: Muhammadun rasoolu Allahi waallatheena maAAahu ashiddao AAala alkuffari ruhamao baynahum tarahum rukkaAAan sujjadan yabtaghoona fadlan mina Allahi waridwanan seemahum fee wujoohihim min athari alssujoodi thalika mathaluhum fee alttawrati wamathaluhum fee alinjeeli kazarAAin akhraja shatahu faazarahu faistaghlatha faistawa AAala sooqihi yuAAjibu alzzurraAAa liyagheetha bihimu alkuffara waAAada Allahu allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati minhum maghfiratan waajran AAatheeman
u: Muhammad Allah ke Rasool hain, aur jo log unke saath hain woh kuffar par sakht aur aapas mein raheem hain. Tum jab dekhoge unhein ruku va sujood aur Allah ke fazl aur uski khushnudi ki talab mein mashgul paogey. Sujood ke asarat unke chehron par maujood hain jinse woh alag pehchane jatey hain. Yeh hai unki sifat Taurat mein. Aur Injeel mein unki misal yun di gayi hai ke goya ek kheti hai jisne pehle kopal nikali, phir us ko taqviyat di, phir woh gadhrayi, phir apne tanay (stem) par khadi ho gayi. Kaasht (sowers) karne walon ko woh khush karti hai taa-ke kuffar inke phalne phoolne par jalein (enraged). Is giroh ke log jo imaan laye hain aur jinhon ne neik amal kiye hain Allah ne unse magfirat aur bade ajar ka waada farmaya hai

ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَا تُقَدِّمُواْ بَيۡنَ يَدَيِ ٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦۖ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمࣱ‏
t: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo la tuqaddimoo bayna yadayi Allahi warasoolihi waittaqoo Allaha inna Allaha sameeAAun AAaleemun
u: Aey logon jo imaan laye ho, Allah aur uske Rasool ke aagey pesh qadmi na karo aur Allah se daro, Allah sab kuch sunne aur jaanne wala hai

ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَا تَرۡفَعُوٓاْ أَصۡوَٰتَكُمۡ فَوۡقَ صَوۡتِ ٱلنَّبِيِّ وَلَا تَجۡهَرُواْ لَهُۥ بِٱلۡقَوۡلِ كَجَهۡرِ بَعۡضِكُمۡ لِبَعۡضٍ أَن تَحۡبَطَ أَعۡمَٰلُكُمۡ وَأَنتُمۡ لَا تَشۡعُرُونَ
t: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo la tarfaAAoo aswatakum fawqa sawti alnnabiyyi wala tajharoo lahu bialqawli kajahri baAAdikum libaAAdin an tahbata aAAmalukum waantum la tashAAuroona
u: Aey logon jo imaan laaye ho, apni aawaz Nabi ki awaaz se buland na karo, aur na Nabi ke saath unchi aawaz se baat kiya karo jis tarah tum aapas mein ek dusre se karte ho, kahin aisa na ho ke tumhara kiya karaya sab gharat ho jaye( deeds become vain) aur tumhein khabar bhi na ho

ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَغُضُّونَ أَصۡوَٰتَهُمۡ عِندَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱمۡتَحَنَ ٱللَّهُ قُلُوبَهُمۡ لِلتَّقۡوَىٰۚ لَهُم مَّغۡفِرَةࣱ وَأَجۡرٌ عَظِيمٌ
t: Inna allatheena yaghuddoona aswatahum AAinda rasooli Allahi olaika allatheena imtahana Allahu quloobahum lilttaqwa lahum maghfiratun waajrun AAatheemun
u: Jo log Rasool-e-khuda ke huzoor baat karte huey apni aawaz pastt rakhte hain woh dar haqeeqat wahi log hai jinke dilon ko Allah ne takwa ke liye jaanch liya hai. Unke liye magfirat hai aur ajr-e- azeem

ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُنَادُونَكَ مِن وَرَآءِ ٱلۡحُجُرَٰتِ أَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
t: Inna allatheena yunadoonaka min warai alhujurati aktharuhum la yaAAqiloona
u: Aey Nabi, jo log tumhein hujron(apartments) ke bahar se pukarte hain unmein se aksar be-aqal hain

ar: وَلَوۡ أَنَّهُمۡ صَبَرُواْ حَتَّىٰ تَخۡرُجَ إِلَيۡهِمۡ لَكَانَ خَيۡرࣰ ا لَّهُمۡۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورࣱ رَّحِيمࣱ‏
t: Walaw annahum sabaroo hatta takhruja ilayhim lakana khayran lahum waAllahu ghafoorun raheemun
u: Agar woh tumhare baramad honay tak sabr karte to unhi ke liye behtar tha, Allah darguzar karne wala aur Raheem hai

ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِن جَآءَكُمۡ فَاسِقُۢ بِنَبَإࣲ فَتَبَيَّنُوٓاْ أَن تُصِيبُواْ قَوۡمَۢا بِجَهَٰلَةࣲ فَتُصۡبِحُواْ عَلَىٰ مَا فَعَلۡتُمۡ نَٰدِمِينَ
t: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo in jaakum fasiqun binabain fatabayyanoo an tuseeboo qawman bijahalatin fatusbihoo AAala ma faAAaltum nadimeena
u: Aey logon jo imaan laaye ho, agar koi faasiq tumhare paas koi khabar lekar aaye to tehqeek kar liya karo, kahin aisa na ho ke tum kisi giroh ko nadanishta(unwittingly) nuksaan pahuncha baitho aur phir apne kiye par pashemaan ho

ar: وَٱعۡلَمُوٓاْ أَنَّ فِيكُمۡ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِۚ لَوۡ يُطِيعُكُمۡ فِي كَثِيرࣲ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَمۡرِ لَعَنِتُّمۡ وَلَٰكِنَّ ٱللَّهَ حَبَّبَ إِلَيۡكُمُ ٱلۡإِيمَٰنَ وَزَيَّنَهُۥ فِي قُلُوبِكُمۡ وَكَرَّهَ إِلَيۡكُمُ ٱلۡكُفۡرَ وَٱلۡفُسُوقَ وَٱلۡعِصۡيَانَۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلرَّٰشِدُونَ
t: WaiAAlamoo anna feekum rasoola Allahi law yuteeAAukum fee katheerin mina alamri laAAanittum walakinna Allaha habbaba ilaykumu aleemana wazayyanahu fee quloobikum wakarraha ilaykumu alkufra waalfusooqa waalAAisyana olaika humu alrrashidoona
u: Khoob jaan rakkho ke tumhare darmiyaan Allah ka Rasool maujood hai. Agar woh bahut se maamelaat mein tumhari baat maan liya kare, to tum khud hi mushkilaat mein mubtala ho jao. Magar Allah ne tumko imaan ki muhabbat di aur usko tumhare liye dil pasand bana diya, aur kufr-o-fusuk aur nafarmani se tumko mutanaffir(abhorrent) kar diya

ar: فَضۡلࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَنِعۡمَةࣰۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمࣱ‏
t: Fadlan mina Allahi waniAAmatan waAllahu AAaleemun hakeemun
u: Aisey hi log Allah ke fazal o ehsaan se raast-ro hain aur Allah Aleem-o-Hakeem(All-Knowing, All-Wise) hai

ar: وَإِن طَآئِفَتَانِ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ ٱقۡتَتَلُواْ فَأَصۡلِحُواْ بَيۡنَهُمَاۖ فَإِنۢ بَغَتۡ إِحۡدَىٰهُمَا عَلَى ٱلۡأُخۡرَىٰ فَقَٰتِلُواْ ٱلَّتِي تَبۡغِي حَتَّىٰ تَفِيٓءَ إِلَىٰٓ أَمۡرِ ٱللَّهِۚ فَإِن فَآءَتۡ فَأَصۡلِحُواْ بَيۡنَهُمَا بِٱلۡعَدۡلِ وَأَقۡسِطُوٓاْۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلۡمُقۡسِطِينَ
t: Wain taifatani mina almumineena iqtataloo faaslihoo baynahuma fain baghat ihdahuma AAala alokhra faqatiloo allatee tabghee hatta tafeea ila amri Allahi fain faat faaslihoo baynahuma bialAAadli waaqsitoo inna Allaha yuhibbu almuqsiteena
u: Aur agar ehle imaan mein se do giroh aapas mein ladh jayein, to unke darmiyan sulah (peace) karao. Phir agar unmein se ek giroh dusre giroh se zyadati karey, to zyadati karne wale se ladho yahan tak ke woh Allah ke hukum ki taraf palat aaye. Phir agar woh palat aaye, to unke darmiyan adal ke saath sulah kara do, aur insaaf karo ke Allah insaaf karne walon ko pasand karta hai

ar: إِنَّمَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ إِخۡوَةࣱ فَأَصۡلِحُواْ بَيۡنَ أَخَوَيۡكُمۡۚ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُرۡحَمُونَ
t: Innama almuminoona ikhwatun faaslihoo bayna akhawaykum waittaqoo Allaha laAAallakum turhamoona
u: Momin to ek dusre ke bhai hain, lihaza apne bhaiyon ke darmiyaan taaluqat ko durust karo aur Allah se daro, umeed hai ke tumpar reham kiya jayega

ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَا يَسۡخَرۡ قَوۡمࣱ مِّن قَوۡمٍ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونُواْ خَيۡرࣰ ا مِّنۡهُمۡ وَلَا نِسَآءࣱ مِّن نِّسَآءٍ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُنَّ خَيۡرࣰ ا مِّنۡهُنَّۖ وَلَا تَلۡمِزُوٓاْ أَنفُسَكُمۡ وَلَا تَنَابَزُواْ بِٱلۡأَلۡقَٰبِۖ بِئۡسَ ٱلِٱسۡمُ ٱلۡفُسُوقُ بَعۡدَ ٱلۡإِيمَٰنِۚ وَمَن لَّمۡ يَتُبۡ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلظَّٰلِمُونَ
t: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo la yaskhar qawmun min qawmin AAasa an yakoonoo khayran minhum wala nisaon min nisain AAasa an yakunna khayran minhunna wala talmizoo anfusakum wala tanabazoo bialalqabi bisa alismu alfusooqu baAAda aleemani waman lam yatub faolaika humu alththalimoona
u: Aey logon jo imaan laye ho, na mard dusre mardon ka mazaak udayein, ho sakta hai ke woh unse behtar hon, aur na auratein dusri auraton ka mazaak udayein, ho sakta hai ke woh unse behtar hon. Aapas mein ek dusre par taan na karo, aur na ek dusre ko burey alaqab (titles) se yaad karo. Imaan lane ke baad fisq mein naam paida karna bahut buri baat hai. Jo log is rawish se baaz na aayein wahi zalim hain

ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ ٱجۡتَنِبُواْ كَثِيرࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱلظَّنِّ إِنَّ بَعۡضَ ٱلظَّنِّ إِثۡمࣱۖ وَلَا تَجَسَّسُواْ وَلَا يَغۡتَب بَّعۡضُكُم بَعۡضًاۚ أَيُحِبُّ أَحَدُكُمۡ أَن يَأۡكُلَ لَحۡمَ أَخِيهِ مَيۡتࣰ ا فَكَرِهۡتُمُوهُۚ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ تَوَّابࣱ رَّحِيمࣱ‏
t: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo ijtaniboo katheeran mina alththanni inna baAAda alththanni ithmun wala tajassasoo wala yaghtab baAAdukum baAAdan ayuhibbu ahadukum an yakula lahma akheehi maytan fakarihtumoohu waittaqoo Allaha inna Allaha tawwabun raheemun
u: Aey logon jo imaan laaye ho, bahut gumaan (suspicion)karne se parheiz karo ke baaz gumaan (suspicion) gunaah hote hain. Tajassus (jasusi) na karo aur tum mein se koi kisi ki geebat na karey. kya tumhare andar koi aisa hai jo apne marey(dead) huey bhai ka gosht khana pasand karega? Dekho, tum khud is se gheen khate ho. Allah se daro, Allah bada tawbah qabool karne wala aur Raheem hai

ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقۡنَٰكُم مِّن ذَكَرࣲ وَأُنثَىٰ وَجَعَلۡنَٰكُمۡ شُعُوبࣰ ا وَقَبَآئِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوٓاْۚ إِنَّ أَكۡرَمَكُمۡ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ أَتۡقَىٰكُمۡۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرࣱ‏
t: Ya ayyuha alnnasu inna khalaqnakum min thakarin waontha wajaAAalnakum shuAAooban waqabaila litaAAarafoo inna akramakum AAinda Allahi atqakum inna Allaha AAaleemun khabeerun
u: Logon, humne tumko ek Mard aur ek Aurat se paida kiya aur phir tumhari qaumein aur biradariyan bana di taa-ke tum ek dusre ko pehchano. Dar haqeeqat Allah ke nazdeek tum mein sab se zyada izzat wala woh hai jo tumhare andar sab se zyada parheizgaar hai. Yaqeenan Allah sab kuch jaan-ne wala aur baakhabar hai

ar: ۞قَالَتِ ٱلۡأَعۡرَابُ ءَامَنَّاۖ قُل لَّمۡ تُؤۡمِنُواْ وَلَٰكِن قُولُوٓاْ أَسۡلَمۡنَا وَلَمَّا يَدۡخُلِ ٱلۡإِيمَٰنُ فِي قُلُوبِكُمۡۖ وَإِن تُطِيعُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ لَا يَلِتۡكُم مِّنۡ أَعۡمَٰلِكُمۡ شَيۡـًٔاۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورࣱ رَّحِيمٌ
t: Qalati alaAArabu amanna qul lam tuminoo walakin qooloo aslamna walamma yadkhuli aleemanu fee quloobikum wain tuteeAAoo Allaha warasoolahu la yalitkum min aAAmalikum shayan inna Allaha ghafoorun raheemun
u: Yeh badwi (Bedouins) kehte hain ke “hum imaan laye” insey kaho: “tum imaan nahin laye, balke yun kaho ke hum muti (submissive) ho gaye” imaan abhi tumhare dilon mein daakhil nahin hua hai. Agar tum Allah aur uske Rasool ki farmabardari ikhtiyar karlo to woh tumhare amal ke ajr mein koi kami na karega.Yakeenan Allah bada darguzar karne wala aur Raheem hai

ar: إِنَّمَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ ثُمَّ لَمۡ يَرۡتَابُواْ وَجَٰهَدُواْ بِأَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ وَأَنفُسِهِمۡ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصَّٰدِقُونَ
t: Innama almuminoona allatheena amanoo biAllahi warasoolihi thumma lam yartaboo wajahadoo biamwalihim waanfusihim fee sabeeli Allahi olaika humu alssadiqoona
u: Haqeeqat mein to momin woh hain jo Allah aur uske Rasool par imaan laye phir unhon ne koi shakk na kiya aur apne jaano aur maalon se Allah ki raah mein jihad kiya, wahi sacchey log hain

ar: قُلۡ أَتُعَلِّمُونَ ٱللَّهَ بِدِينِكُمۡ وَٱللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيمࣱ‏
t: Qul atuAAallimoona Allaha bideenikum waAllahu yaAAlamu ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi waAllahu bikulli shayin AAaleemun
u: Aey Nabi, In [mudaiyaan e imaan (pretenders to faith)] se kaho, kya tum Allah ko apne deen ki ittilah (apprising) de rahey ho? Halanke Allah zameen aur Aasmano ki har cheez ko jaanta hai aur woh har shay ka ilm rakhta hai

ar: يَمُنُّونَ عَلَيۡكَ أَنۡ أَسۡلَمُواْۖ قُل لَّا تَمُنُّواْ عَلَيَّ إِسۡلَٰمَكُمۖ بَلِ ٱللَّهُ يَمُنُّ عَلَيۡكُمۡ أَنۡ هَدَىٰكُمۡ لِلۡإِيمَٰنِ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
t: Yamunnoona AAalayka an aslamoo qul la tamunnoo AAalayya islamakum bali Allahu yamunnu AAalaykum an hadakum lileemani in kuntum sadiqeena
u: Yeh log tumpar ehsan jatate hain ke inhon ne Islam qabool karliya. Inse kaho apne Islam ka ehsan mujhpar na rakkho , balke Allah tumpar apna ehsan rakhta hai ke usne tumhein imaan ki hidayat di agar tum waqai apne daawa-e-imaan mein sacchey ho

ar: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعۡلَمُ غَيۡبَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَٱللَّهُ بَصِيرُۢ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ
t: Inna Allaha yaAAlamu ghayba alssamawati waalardi waAllahu baseerun bima taAAmaloona
u: Allah zameen aur aasmano ki har poshida(hidden) cheez ka ilm rakhta hai aur jo kuch tum karte ho woh sab uski nigaah mein hai

ar: قٓۚ وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ ٱلۡمَجِيدِ
t: Qaf waalqurani almajeedi
u: Qaaf, Kasam hai quran-e-majeed ki

ar: بَلۡ عَجِبُوٓاْ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرࣱ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَقَالَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا شَيۡءٌ عَجِيبٌ
t: Bal AAajiboo an jaahum munthirun minhum faqala alkafiroona hatha shayon AAajeebun
u: Balke in logon ko taajub is baat par hua ke ek khabardar karne wala khud inhi mein se inke paas aa gaya, phir munkireen kehne lagey “yeh to ajeeb baat hai

ar: أَءِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابࣰ اۖ ذَٰلِكَ رَجۡعُۢ بَعِيدࣱ‏
t: Aitha mitna wakunna turaban thalika rajAAun baAAeedun
u: Kya jab hum mar jayenge aur khaak (mitti) ho jayenge (to dobara uthaye jayenge)? Yeh wapasi to aqal se baeed hai”

ar: قَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا مَا تَنقُصُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ مِنۡهُمۡۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَٰبٌ حَفِيظُۢ
t: Qad AAalimna ma tanqusu alardu minhum waAAindana kitabun hafeethun
u: Zameen inke jism mein se jo kuch khati hai woh sab hamare ilm mein hai aur hamare paas ek kitaab hai jismein sab kuch mehfooz hai

ar: بَلۡ كَذَّبُواْ بِٱلۡحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ فَهُمۡ فِيٓ أَمۡرࣲ مَّرِيجٍ
t: Bal kaththaboo bialhaqqi lamma jaahum fahum fee amrin mareejin
u: Balke in logon ne to jis waqt haqq inke paas aaya usi waqt usey saaf jhutla diya. Isi wajah se ab yeh uljhan mein padey huey hain

ar: أَفَلَمۡ يَنظُرُوٓاْ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَوۡقَهُمۡ كَيۡفَ بَنَيۡنَٰهَا وَزَيَّنَّٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجࣲ‏
t: Afalam yanthuroo ila alssamai fawqahum kayfa banaynaha wazayyannaha wama laha min furoojin
u: Accha, to kya inhon ne kabhi apne upar aasmaan ki taraf nahin dekha? Kis tarah humne usey banaya aur aarasta (zeenat/ beautify) kiya, aur usmein kahin koi rakhna(cracks/rifts) nahin hai

ar: وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ مَدَدۡنَٰهَا وَأَلۡقَيۡنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِيَ وَأَنۢبَتۡنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجِۭ بَهِيجࣲ‏
t: Waalarda madadnaha waalqayna feeha rawasiya waanbatna feeha min kulli zawjin baheejin
u: Aur zameen ko humne bichaya aur ismein pahadh jamaye aur uske andar har taraah ki khush manzar nabataat uga di

ar: تَبۡصِرَةࣰ وَذِكۡرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبۡدࣲ مُّنِيبࣲ‏
t: Tabsiratan wathikra likulli AAabdin muneebin
u: Yeh saari cheezein aankhein kholne wali aur sabaq dene wali hain har us bandey ke liye jo (haqq ki taraf) rujoo karne wala ho

ar: وَنَزَّلۡنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءࣰ مُّبَٰرَكࣰ ا فَأَنۢبَتۡنَا بِهِۦ جَنَّٰتࣲ وَحَبَّ ٱلۡحَصِيدِ
t: Wanazzalna mina alssamai maan mubarakan faanbatna bihi jannatin wahabba alhaseedi
u: Aur aasmaan se humne barkat wala paani naazil kiya,phir ussey baagh aur fasal ke galley

ar: وَٱلنَّخۡلَ بَاسِقَٰتࣲ لَّهَا طَلۡعࣱ نَّضِيدࣱ‏
t: Waalnnakhla basiqatin laha talAAun nadeedun
u: Aur buland o baala khajoor ke darakht paida kardiye jinpar phalon(fruits) se ladey khoshey teh-bar-teh lagte (fruit arranged in layers) hain

ar: رِّزۡقࣰ ا لِّلۡعِبَادِۖ وَأَحۡيَيۡنَا بِهِۦ بَلۡدَةࣰ مَّيۡتࣰ اۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡخُرُوجُ
t: Rizqan lilAAibadi waahyayna bihi baldatan maytan kathalika alkhurooju
u: Yeh intizaam hai bandon ko rizq dene ka is pani se hum ek murda zameen ko zindagi baksh dete hain (marey huey Insano ka zameen se) nikalne bhi isi tarah hoga

ar: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحࣲ وَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلرَّسِّ وَثَمُودُ
t: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin waashabu alrrassi wathamoodu
u: In se pehle Nooh ki qaum, aur ashab-ur-rass ,aur Samood

ar: وَعَادࣱ وَفِرۡعَوۡنُ وَإِخۡوَٰنُ لُوطࣲ‏
t: WaAAadun wafirAAawnu waikhwanu lootin
u: Aur Aad, aur Firoun , aur Lut ke bhai

ar: وَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡأَيۡكَةِ وَقَوۡمُ تُبَّعࣲۚ كُلࣱّ كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيدِ
t: Waashabu alaykati waqawmu tubbaAAin kullun kaththaba alrrusula fahaqqa waAAeedi
u: Aur aykah( dwellers in the wood) wale, aur tubba ki qaum ke log bhi jhutla chuke hain har ek ne Rasoolon ko jhutlaya , aur aakhir e kaar meri waeed(threat) un par chaspan ho gayi

ar: أَفَعَيِينَا بِٱلۡخَلۡقِ ٱلۡأَوَّلِۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي لَبۡسࣲ مِّنۡ خَلۡقࣲ جَدِيدࣲ‏
t: AfaAAayeena bialkhalqi alawwali bal hum fee labsin min khalqin jadeedin
u: Kya pehli baar ki takhleeq(creation) se hum aajiz (worn out) thay? Magar ek nayi takhleeq ki taraf se yeh log shakk mein padey huey hain

ar: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ وَنَعۡلَمُ مَا تُوَسۡوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفۡسُهُۥۖ وَنَحۡنُ أَقۡرَبُ إِلَيۡهِ مِنۡ حَبۡلِ ٱلۡوَرِيدِ
t: Walaqad khalaqna alinsana wanaAAlamu ma tuwaswisu bihi nafsuhu wanahnu aqrabu ilayhi min habli alwareedi
u: Humne Insaan ko paida kiya hai aur uske dil mein ubharne wale waswason tak ko hum jaante hain. Hum to us ki rag-e-gardan(jugular vein) se bhi zyada us se qareeb hain

ar: إِذۡ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلۡمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدࣱ‏
t: Ith yatalaqqa almutalaqqiyani AAani alyameeni waAAani alshshimali qaAAeedun
u: (aur hamare is barah-e-raast ilm ke alawa)do kaatib(scribes) uske dayein aur bayein baithay(farishtey) har cheez sabt(likh) kar rahe hain

ar: مَّا يَلۡفِظُ مِن قَوۡلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيۡهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدࣱ‏
t: Ma yalfithu min qawlin illa ladayhi raqeebun AAateedun
u: Koi lafz us ki zubaan se nahin nikalta jisey mehfooz karne ke liye ek hazir baash nigraan maujood na ho

ar: وَجَآءَتۡ سَكۡرَةُ ٱلۡمَوۡتِ بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنۡهُ تَحِيدُ
t: Wajaat sakratu almawti bialhaqqi thalika ma kunta minhu taheedu
u: Phir dekho, woh maut ki jaan-kani (agony of death) haqq lekar aa pahunchi, yeh wahi cheez hai jisse tu bhaaghta tha

ar: وَنُفِخَ فِي ٱلصُّورِۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡوَعِيدِ
t: Wanufikha fee alssoori thalika yawmu alwaAAeedi
u: Aur phir sur (trumpet) phoonka gaya, yeh hai woh din jiska tujhe khauf dilaya jata tha

ar: وَجَآءَتۡ كُلُّ نَفۡسࣲ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقࣱ وَشَهِيدࣱ‏
t: Wajaat kullu nafsin maAAaha saiqun washaheedun
u: Har shaks is haal mein aa gaya ke uske saath ek haank(drive) kar lane wala hai aur ek gawahi dene wala

ar: لَّقَدۡ كُنتَ فِي غَفۡلَةࣲ مِّنۡ هَٰذَا فَكَشَفۡنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ حَدِيدࣱ‏
t: Laqad kunta fee ghaflatin min hatha fakashafna AAanka ghitaaka fabasaruka alyawma hadeedun
u: Is cheez ki taraf se tu gaflat mein tha, humne woh purda hata diya jo tere aagey pada hua tha aur aaj teri nigaah khoob tez hai

ar: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَٰذَا مَا لَدَيَّ عَتِيدٌ
t: Waqala qareenuhu hatha ma ladayya AAateedun
u: Uske saathi ne arz kiya ye jo meri supurdgi mein tha haazir hai

ar: أَلۡقِيَا فِي جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدࣲ‏
t: Alqiya fee jahannama kulla kaffarin AAaneedin
u: Hukum diya gaya “phenk do jahannum mein har katte (hardened, stubborn) kaafir ko jo haqq se inaad rakhta tha

ar: مَّنَّاعࣲ لِّلۡخَيۡرِ مُعۡتَدࣲ مُّرِيبٍ
t: MannaAAin lilkhayri muAAtadin mureebin
u: Khair ko roakne wala aur hadd se tajauz (exceeds the limits) karne wala tha, shakk mein pada hua tha

ar: ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَأَلۡقِيَاهُ فِي ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلشَّدِيدِ
t: Allathee jaAAala maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara faalqiyahu fee alAAathabi alshshadeedi
u: Aur Allah ke saath kisi dusre ko khuda banaye baitha tha. Daal do usey sakht azaab mein”

ar: ۞قَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ رَبَّنَا مَآ أَطۡغَيۡتُهُۥ وَلَٰكِن كَانَ فِي ضَلَٰلِۭ بَعِيدࣲ‏
t: Qala qareenuhu rabbana ma atghaytuhu walakin kana fee dalalin baAAeedin
u: Uske saathi ne arz kiya “khuda-wanda, maine isko sarkash nahin banaya balke yeh khud hi parle darje ki gumrahi mein pada hua tha”

ar: قَالَ لَا تَخۡتَصِمُواْ لَدَيَّ وَقَدۡ قَدَّمۡتُ إِلَيۡكُم بِٱلۡوَعِيدِ
t: Qala la takhtasimoo ladayya waqad qaddamtu ilaykum bialwaAAeedi
u: Jawab mein irshad hua “mere huzoor jhagda na karo, main tumko pehle hi anjaam-e-badd se khabardar kar chuka tha

ar: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ لَدَيَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِظَلَّٰمࣲ لِّلۡعَبِيدِ
t: Ma yubaddalu alqawlu ladayya wama ana bithallamin lilAAabeedi
u: Mere haan (yahan) baat palti nahin jaati aur main apne bandon par zulm todhne wala nahin hoon”

ar: يَوۡمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمۡتَلَأۡتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلۡ مِن مَّزِيدࣲ‏
t: Yawma naqoolu lijahannama hali imtalati wataqoolu hal min mazeedin
u: Woh din jabke hum jahannum se puchenge kya tu bhar gayi? Aur woh kahegi kya aur kuch hai

ar: وَأُزۡلِفَتِ ٱلۡجَنَّةُ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ غَيۡرَ بَعِيدٍ
t: Waozlifati aljannatu lilmuttaqeena ghayra baAAeedin
u: Aur Jannat muttaqin ke qareeb le aayi jayegi, kuch bhi dur na hogi

ar: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظࣲ‏
t: Hatha ma tooAAadoona likulli awwabin hafeethin
u: Irshad hoga “yeh hai woh cheez jiska tumse waada kiya jata tha, har us shaks ke liye jo bahut rujoo karne wala aur badi nigehdaasht (watchful of his conduct) karne wala tha

ar: مَّنۡ خَشِيَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنَ بِٱلۡغَيۡبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلۡبࣲ مُّنِيبٍ
t: Man khashiya alrrahmana bialghaybi wajaa biqalbin muneebin
u: Jo bay dekhe Rehman se darta tha, aur jo dil-e-girwida liye huey aaya hai

ar: ٱدۡخُلُوهَا بِسَلَٰمࣲۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡخُلُودِ
t: Odkhulooha bisalamin thalika yawmu alkhuloodi
u: Dakhil ho jao Jannat mein salamati ke saath” woh din hayat-e-abadi (eternity) ka din hoga

ar: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيۡنَا مَزِيدࣱ‏
t: Lahum ma yashaoona feeha waladayna mazeedun
u: Wahan unke liye woh sab kuch hoga jo woh chahenge, aur hamare paas issey zyada bhi bahut kuch unke liye hai

ar: وَكَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُم مِّن قَرۡنٍ هُمۡ أَشَدُّ مِنۡهُم بَطۡشࣰ ا فَنَقَّبُواْ فِي ٱلۡبِلَٰدِ هَلۡ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
t: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hum ashaddu minhum batshan fanaqqaboo fee albiladi hal min maheesin
u: Hum unse pehle bahut si qaumon ko halaak kar chuke hain jo insey bahut zyada taaqatwar thi aur duniya ke mulkon ko unhon ne chaan maara tha phir kya woh koi jaaye panaah paa sakey

ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكۡرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلۡبٌ أَوۡ أَلۡقَى ٱلسَّمۡعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدࣱ‏
t: Inna fee thalika lathikra liman kana lahu qalbun aw alqa alssamAAa wahuwa shaheedun
u: Is tareekh mein ibrat ka sabaq hai har us shaks ke liye jo dil rakhta ho, ya jo tawajju se baat ko suney

ar: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا فِي سِتَّةِ أَيَّامࣲ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبࣲ‏
t: Walaqad khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma fee sittati ayyamin wama massana min lughoobin
u: Humne zameen aur aasmaano ko aur unke darmiyan ki saari cheezon ko chey(six) dino mein paida kardiya aur humein koi thakaan laahiq na hui

ar: فَٱصۡبِرۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ قَبۡلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمۡسِ وَقَبۡلَ ٱلۡغُرُوبِ
t: Faisbir AAala ma yaqooloona wasabbih bihamdi rabbika qabla tulooAAi alshshamsi waqabla alghuroobi
u: Pas aey Nabi, jo baatein yeh log banate hain unpar sabr karo, aur apne Rubb ki hamd ke saath uski tasbeeh karte raho, tulu-e-aftaab( rising of the sun ) aur guroob-e-aftaab( before its setting ) se pehle

ar: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡهُ وَأَدۡبَٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ
t: Wamina allayli fasabbihhu waadbara alssujoodi
u: Aur raat ke waqt phir uski tasbeeh karo aur sajda reizion se faarig honay ke baad bhi(wake of prostration)

ar: وَٱسۡتَمِعۡ يَوۡمَ يُنَادِ ٱلۡمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانࣲ قَرِيبࣲ‏
t: WaistamiAA yawma yunadi almunadi min makanin qareebin
u: Aur suno, jis din munadi (pukaar) karne wala (har shaks ke)qareeb hi se pukarega

ar: يَوۡمَ يَسۡمَعُونَ ٱلصَّيۡحَةَ بِٱلۡحَقِّۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡخُرُوجِ
t: Yawma yasmaAAoona alssayhata bialhaqqi thalika yawmu alkhurooji
u: Jis din sab log aawaza-e-hashar ko theek theek sun rahey honge, woh zameen se murdon ke nikalne ka din hoga

ar: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نُحۡيِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيۡنَا ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
t: Inna nahnu nuhyee wanumeetu wailayna almaseeru
u: Hum hi zindagi bakshte hain aur hum hi maut detey hain, aur hamari hi taraf us din sabko palatna hai

ar: يَوۡمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ عَنۡهُمۡ سِرَاعࣰ اۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشۡرٌ عَلَيۡنَا يَسِيرࣱ‏
t: Yawma tashaqqaqu alardu AAanhum siraAAan thalika hashrun AAalayna yaseerun
u: Jab zameen phategi log uske andar se nikal kar teiz teiz bhage ja rahe honge. Yeh hashar hamare liye bahut aasaan hai

ar: نَّحۡنُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيۡهِم بِجَبَّارࣲۖ فَذَكِّرۡ بِٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
t: Nahnu aAAlamu bima yaqooloona wama anta AAalayhim bijabbarin fathakkir bialqurani man yakhafu waAAeedi
u: Aey Nabi, jo baatein yeh log bana rahe hain unhein hum khoob jaante hain, aur tumhara kaam inse jabran (zabardasti) baat manwana nahin hai. Bas tum is Quran ke zariye se har us shaks ko nasihat kardo jo meri tambeeh se darey

ar: وَٱلذَّٰرِيَٰتِ ذَرۡوࣰ ا
t: Waalththariyati tharwan
u: Kasam hai un hawaon ki jo gard (dust) udane wali hain

ar: فَٱلۡحَٰمِلَٰتِ وِقۡرࣰ ا
t: Faalhamilati wiqran
u: Phir pani se ladeh huey badal uthane wali hain

ar: فَٱلۡجَٰرِيَٰتِ يُسۡرࣰ ا
t: Faaljariyati yusran
u: Phir subuk raftari (smoothly speed along) ke saath chalne wali hain

ar: فَٱلۡمُقَسِّمَٰتِ أَمۡرًا
t: Faalmuqassimati amran
u: Phir ek baday kaam (barish) ki taqseem karne wali hain

ar: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقࣱ‏
t: Innama tooAAadoona lasadiqun
u: Haqq yeh hai ke jis cheez ka tumhein khauf dilaya ja raha hai woh sacchi hai

ar: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٰقِعࣱ‏
t: Wainna alddeena lawaqiAAun
u: Aur jazaa-e-aamal (recompense) zaroor pesh aani hai

ar: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلۡحُبُكِ
t: Waalssamai thati alhubuki
u: Kasam hai muttafarriq shakalon(numerous forms) waley aasmaan ki

ar: إِنَّكُمۡ لَفِي قَوۡلࣲ مُّخۡتَلِفࣲ‏
t: Innakum lafee qawlin mukhtalifin
u: (Aakhirat ke barey mein) tumhari baat ek durse se mukhtalif hai

ar: يُؤۡفَكُ عَنۡهُ مَنۡ أُفِكَ
t: Yufaku AAanhu man ofika
u: Ussey wahi bargashta (deluded/averse) hota hai jo haqq se phira hua hai

ar: قُتِلَ ٱلۡخَرَّٰصُونَ
t: Qutila alkharrasoona
u: Maarey gaye qayas-o-gumaan (conjecturers) se hukum lagane wale

ar: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ فِي غَمۡرَةࣲ سَاهُونَ
t: Allatheena hum fee ghamratin sahoona
u: Jo jihalat(ignorance) mein garq aur gaflat mein madhosh hain

ar: يَسۡـَٔلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوۡمُ ٱلدِّينِ
t: Yasaloona ayyana yawmu alddeeni
u: Puchte hain aakhir woh roz-e-jaza kab aayega

ar: يَوۡمَ هُمۡ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفۡتَنُونَ
t: Yawma hum AAala alnnari yuftanoona
u: Woh us roz aayega jab yeh log aag par tapaye jayenge

ar: ذُوقُواْ فِتۡنَتَكُمۡ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَ
t: Thooqoo fitnatakum hatha allathee kuntum bihi tastaAAjiloona
u: (Insey kaha jayega) ab chakkho maza apne fitne ka, yeh wahi cheez hai jiske liye tum jaldi macha rahey thay

ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّٰتࣲ وَعُيُونٍ
t: Inna almuttaqeena fee jannatin waAAuyoonin
u: Albatta muttaqi log us roz baaghon(gardens) aur chashmo (fountains) mein hongey

ar: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَبۡلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحۡسِنِينَ
t: Akhitheena ma atahum rabbuhum innahum kanoo qabla thalika muhsineena
u: Jo kuch unka Rubb unhein dega usey khushi khushi le rahey hongey. Woh us din ke aane se pehle neikukar (doers of good) thay

ar: كَانُواْ قَلِيلࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ مَا يَهۡجَعُونَ
t: Kanoo qaleelan mina allayli ma yahjaAAoona
u: Raaton(nights) ko kam hi sotey(sleep) thay

ar: وَبِٱلۡأَسۡحَارِ هُمۡ يَسۡتَغۡفِرُونَ
t: Wabialashari hum yastaghfiroona
u: Phir wahi raat ke pichle peharon mein maafi maangte thay

ar: وَفِيٓ أَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ حَقࣱّ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلۡمَحۡرُومِ
t: Wafee amwalihim haqqun lilssaili waalmahroomi
u: Aur unke maalon(wealth) mein haqq tha saahil( maangne waley) aur mehroom(destitute) ke liye

ar: وَفِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ ءَايَٰتࣱ لِّلۡمُوقِنِينَ
t: Wafee alardi ayatun lilmooqineena
u: Zameen mein bahut si nishaniyan hain yaqeen laney walon ke liye

ar: وَفِيٓ أَنفُسِكُمۡۚ أَفَلَا تُبۡصِرُونَ
t: Wafee anfusikum afala tubsiroona
u: Aur khud tumhare apne wajood mein hain, kya tumko soojhta nahin

ar: وَفِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزۡقُكُمۡ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
t: Wafee alssamai rizqukum wama tooAAadoona
u: Aasman hi mein hai tumhara rizq bhi aur woh cheez bhi jiska tumse waada kiya ja raha hai

ar: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقࣱّ مِّثۡلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمۡ تَنطِقُونَ
t: Fawarabbi alssamai waalardi innahu lahaqqun mithla ma annakum tantiqoona
u: Pas kasam hai aasmaan aur zameen ke maalik ki, yeh baat haqq hai, aisi hi yaqeeni jaise tum bol rahey ho

ar: هَلۡ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيۡفِ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ ٱلۡمُكۡرَمِينَ
t: Hal ataka hadeethu dayfi ibraheema almukrameena
u: Aey Nabi, Ibrahim ke muazzaz mehmano ki hiqayat bhi tumhein pahunchi hai

ar: إِذۡ دَخَلُواْ عَلَيۡهِ فَقَالُواْ سَلَٰمࣰ اۖ قَالَ سَلَٰمࣱ قَوۡمࣱ مُّنكَرُونَ
t: Ith dakhaloo AAalayhi faqaloo salaman qala salamun qawmun munkaroona
u: Jab woh uske haan (yahan) aaye to kaha aapko salaam hai. Usne kaha “ aap logon ko bhi salaam hai kuch na-aashna se log hain”

ar: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجۡلࣲ سَمِينࣲ‏
t: Faragha ila ahlihi fajaa biAAijlin sameenin
u: Phir woh chupke se apne ghar walon ke paas gaya, aur ek mota taaza bachda (calf) laa kar

ar: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيۡهِمۡ قَالَ أَلَا تَأۡكُلُونَ
t: Faqarrabahu ilayhim qala ala takuloona
u: Mehmanon ke aage pesh kiya. Usne kaha aap hazraat khate nahin

ar: فَأَوۡجَسَ مِنۡهُمۡ خِيفَةࣰۖ قَالُواْ لَا تَخَفۡۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَٰمٍ عَلِيمࣲ‏
t: Faawjasa minhum kheefatan qaloo la takhaf wabashsharoohu bighulamin AAaleemin
u: Phir woh apne dil mein unse dara. Unhon ne kaha dariye nahin, aur usey ek zee-ilm ladke ki paidaish ka mushda (good news/basharat) sunaya

ar: فَأَقۡبَلَتِ ٱمۡرَأَتُهُۥ فِي صَرَّةࣲ فَصَكَّتۡ وَجۡهَهَا وَقَالَتۡ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمࣱ‏
t: Faaqbalati imraatuhu fee sarratin fasakkat wajhaha waqalat AAajoozun AAaqeemun
u: Yeh sunkar uski biwi cheekhti hui aage badhi aur usne apna mooh peeth liya aur kehne lagi, “boodhi baanj”

ar: قَالُواْ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
t: Qaloo kathaliki qala rabbuki innahu huwa alhakeemu alAAaleemu
u: Unhon ne kaha “yahi kuch farmaya hai tere Rubb ne. Woh hakeem hai aur sab kuch jaanta hai
